question: Mujhe kisi apne se schizophrenia ka tashkhees hua hai. Main kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
answer: Hum fitratan un logon ki madad karna chahte hain jo behaal hain. Jab koi pyara jisay physical health ka masla ho, madad karna wazeh nazar aata hai, lekin mental illness jaise schizophrenia mein aksar log unsure hote hain ke behtareen madad kaise de. Kuch tips hain: Aapko schizophrenia ka expert hona zaruri nahi, magar iske bare mein zyada jan'nay se aap samajh sakte hain. Schizophrenia ke bare mein bahut myths hain, toh reputable resources dhoondein. Hamara Schizophrenia info sheet shuruaat ke liye acha hai. BC Schizophrenia Society se bhi bohat maloomat milti hai. Problems ya fikr par baat karna madadgar ho sakta hai. Yeh samajhna zaruri hai ke schizophrenia mein baat karna mushkil hota hai, aur iska symptom hallucinations aur delusions baat cheet ko mushkil banate hain. Jab koi pyara khul ke baat kare, usay dhyan se sunein baghair phone ya TV jaise distractions ke. Unki baat sun'nay ke liye waqt dein, chaahe wo usual se zyada waqt lein. Hamdardi aur bina judge kiye sunein. Agar aap masla samajh na paayein, ya nazariya mukhtalif ho, to bhi aapka concern pyare ke dukh ya mushkil jazbat hone chahiye. Family Toolkit ke Module Three mein communication aur sun'nay ke detailed tareeqay hain. Kuch log sab baatein ek sath ya kabhi bhi baat karne ko tayar nahin hote, is baat ka lehsan rakhein. Schizophrenia ke symptoms jaise hallucinations (wo ehsaas jo asal mein nahin hote, jaise awaazain sun'na) ya delusions (yakeen jo sach nahin ho sakte, jaise peechha kiya ja raha ho) ka thodi der mein khatam hona mushkil hota hai, chaahe ilaaj ho raha ho. In symptoms ko psychosis kehte hain. Kai log pyare ki hallucinations ya delusions ko respond karne mein mushkilat mehsoos karte hain. In par behas karna behtareen nahin. Yaad raha ke delusions schizophrenia ke symptoms hain, yeh sochain nahin jin se baat kar ke hataa diya ja sake. Kahiye ke unke experiences jhoot ya asal nahin hain yeh madad nahin karta jabke unke liye bohat asli hotay hain. Behtar tareeqa yeh hai ke aap un jazbat ko samjhein jo hallucinations ya delusions ke sath aate hain, bina tasdeeq ya rad kiye. Misal ke taur par agar pyara awaaz se pareshan ya ghabrahat mehsoos kar raha ho toh na kaho 'tum theek ho, yeh sach nahin hai' balkeh keh sakte hain 'Main soch sakta hoon ke yeh awaaz kitni takleef deh hai. Main samajh sakta hoon ke yeh aapko darata hai.' Behtareen ilaaj aur support ke sath, hallucinations aur delusions ko log manage karna asaan samajhte hain. Poochein ke aap kaise madad kar sakte hain. Serious mental illness jaise schizophrenia mein log future planning karte hain, jese advanced directives ya Ulysses Agreements, taki jab woh sehatmand hon unki khwahishat care team aur loved ones tak pohnchen. Apne pyare se poochhein ke kya un k pass koi plan hai taake pata ho jab madad chahiye ho to kya karna hai. Zyada maloomat ke liye BC Schizophrenia Society dekhe. Agar psychosis ka episode ho raha ho ya recovery ho rahi ho to extra madad chahiye hoti hai. Jaise hallucinations ya delusions walay shakhs ko zyada fursat aur kam logon ke marhomat chahiye hotay hain, ke unko bheed ya aankhon se mulakaat se bhi takleef ho sakti hai. Recovery ke waqt araam aur khamoshi chahiye hoti hai. Kuch log jald apni routine mei wapis aa jate hain, jabke kuch ko mehnat aur waqt lagta hai. Zyada madad kabhi kabhi nuksan deh bhi ho sakti hai. Aap ke liye acha ho ga ke pyare ke kaam khud samhaalain, lekin activity aur confidence dobara hasil karna recovery ka aham hissa hai. Pyare ko encourage karen ke din me zimmedari lein, aur jab wo madad chahen bataen. Schizophrenia mushkil bimari hai sab ke liye. Psychosis mein pyara khaufnak ehsaas kar sakta hai jo samajhna mushkil ho. Wo aam rawaiye se farq kar sakte hain. Schizophrenia ke dusre symptoms jazbat zahir karna, communication aur dilchaspi ko mushkil banate hain. Yeh sab illness ke symptoms hain, kisi ki galti nahin, magar in se coping mushkil hota hai. Apne liye family aur friends support group ka rujoo karein. Apna routine jaise exercise aur shauq jari rakhein. Kisi aur family member ya dost se madad lein takay caregiving mein madad mile, khaas taur par shuruat mein.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Prion Disease kya hai
answer: Ek tezi se barhta hua neurocognitive disorder hai jo transmissible spongiform encephalopathies ki wajah se hota hai, jis se shadid motor ataxia aur dementia paidah hoti hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Zeheni sehat ke professionals mein farq kya hai?
answer: Zeheni sehat ke bohat se qisam ke professionals hain. Alag alag providers aur unki khidmat samajhna mushkil ho sakta hai. Har ek ke pataward aur talim mein farq hota hai, aur unke maharat ke ilaqe bhi mukhtalif hote hain. Jo professional aapke zarurat ke liye behtareen ho usay dhoondhna kuch tehqiqat talab kar sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mujhe chhote ghar ke kaamon se itna zahni bojh kyu mehsoos hota hai?
answer: Yeh aksar executive dysfunction hota hai. Ek chhota sa kaam chunain jaise sirf do plates dhona aur baaki abhi ignore karain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Humor defense mechanism kya hai
answer: Ek adaptive strategy jo fard ko yaqeeni tor par bohat takleef deh halaat ka samna karne deti hai aur unke ironical ya mazaaqia pehlu ko numayan karti hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: All or Nothing Thinking kya hai
answer: Ek distortion jisme fard zindagi ke tajurbe ko bilkul do hisso mein taqseem karta hai jaise ke kamyabi ya nakami, aur beech ka koi pehlu nahi dekhta.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Poverty of Content of Speech kya hai
answer: Aisi guftagu jo lafzon ke itraaf mein kaafi ho lekin be-maani ya khali jumlon ki wajah se kam maloomati ho.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Borderline personality disorder ke liye maloomat aur madad kahan milegi?
answer: Borderline personality disorder ya BPD aik ilaaj hone wala marz hai. Is mein paanch qism ke symptoms hotay hain jo rawaiyat, jazbaat, talluqaat, shanakht ka ehsas, aur aagahi ke gird idaaray jaate hain. Aap hamari info sheet borderline personality disorder par padh sakte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Hello
answer: Hello. Barae meharbani batayein ke aaj main aap ki zehni sehat ke sawaalat mein kaise madad kar sakta hoon.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Vaping par kya saboot hain?
answer: Vaping ka matlab hai ek aisi device ka istemaal jisme liquids, aksar maze daar flavor ke saath, vapour ban jata hai, isliye ise vaping kehte hain aur use saans ke zariye andar liya jata hai. Ek vaping device mein mouthpiece, tank ya reservoir hota hai liquid rakhne ke liye, ek heating element aur ek battery hoti hai jo heating element ko chalati hai. Liquid garam kar ke mist ban jata hai, jo munh se lungs mein jata hai jahan nicotine ya cannabis khoon mein ghultsata hai. Bacha hua vapour saans ke zariye bahar nikala jata hai. Vaping devices mukhtalif qisam ke, shakal aur size ke hote hain, jinhein e-cigarettes, vape pens, vapes, mods, tanks, ya e-hookahs kehte hain. Vaping liquids yani e-liquid ya e-juice solvent (amuman propylene glycol ya glycerol), flavor aur nicotine ya cannabis se mil kar banta hai, lekin kabhi kabhi yeh khali bhi ho sakta hai. British Columbia mein vaping products kharidne ke liye aap ki umr 19 saal honi chahiye. Cigarette peene wale jawaanon ki tadaad pichlay chand salon mein kam hui hai jabke vaping barh rahi hai. E-cigarettes ko smoking ke badal ke taur par develop kiya gaya tha. Pehle devices 2003 mein available hue the aur dikhne mein traditional cigarette jese lagte thay. Nicotine vapour mein significantly kam zaheer aur doosray zarraat hotay hain muqable cigarette ke dhuan ke. Vaping cigarettes ki muqable kam nuksaan-deh hai aur saboot yeh bhi dikhata hai ke yeh kuch logon ko cigarette chorne mein madadgar ho sakta hai. Saboot yeh zahir karta hai ke vaping shayad tobacco smoking ke liye gateway nahi hai. Halanke cigarettes ke muqable kam nuksaan deh hai, vaping ke bhi mumkin nuksaan hain. Nicotine aur mumkin cancer paida karne wale maadey ka halka exposure hota hai vapour mein. Carcinogen wo madah hai jo cancer paida kar sakta hai. Kuch saboot yeh kehte hain ke jawaan log jaante nahi ke vaping liquid aksar nicotine rakhta hai. E-cigarettes control nahi hote aur vaping liquids mein nicotine ki miqdaar brands ke mutabiq kafi farq karti hai. Vaping liquids mein maujood dusre chemicals, flavourings, aur bharay huay dhatu abhi tak theek tareeke se parakhe nahin gaye. Lambe arsey ke sehat ke khatrey abhi tak maloom nahi hain. Mazeed research ki zaroorat hai. Vaping products ki marketing, zyada tar social media par, jawaanon ko attract karne ke liye design ki jati hai. Un flavors ki range jo fruity aur meethi hoti hai, aur vaping devices ka look aur feel naujawanon ko pasand aata hai. Jawaan log vaping ko mazeed aur doston ke saath guftagu ka zariya samajhtay hain aur kam nuksaan-deh tareeke se smoke karte hain. Vaping par guftugu ke liye waqt aur jaga banana ek zaroori tareeqa hai jis se hum jawaanon aur ek dosray ko madad de sakte hain ke wo behtareen faislay kar saken ke kya, kab aur kitni vaping karni chahiye. Hum offer karte hain, zyada nahi, har waqt nahi, aur mehfooz mohol mein, jo kisi bhi maadey ke istemaal par sochnay ka tareeqa hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Waxy Flexibility kya hai
answer: Catatonic khasoosiyat jisme patient lambi muddat tak bahar se lagai gayi jismani postur ko qaim rakhta hai, aarambhi harkat ke muqable mein aram se malayi jaise thehr jata hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Maine ek tashkhees mili hai lekin mujhe nahin lagta ke yeh durust hai. Main kya kar sakta hoon?
answer: Agar mumkina ho, toh apni fikr us professional ke saath uthayen jisne tashkhees di hai. Iss tarah, professional aapke sawalat ke jawab de sakta hai aur aap unke faislay ko behtar samajh sakte hain. Agar yeh masla hal nahin hota ya follow-up appointment mumkin nahin, toh aap dusray ray ki talab kar sakte hain. Dusri ray ek mukhtalif professional se jaiza hai. Yeh aapko behtar samajh deinay mein madad de sakta hai ke kya ho raha hai aur iske bare mein kya karna chahiye. Bari sehat ke faislon mein dusri ray aam hoti haikisi ke jazaat nuqsan nahin pohanchayenge aur aapka doctor bhi reasoning requests ko manzoor karne ki koshish karega. Apne family doctor se baat karen ya walk-in clinic jayen taake apne options discuss karen aur agar zarurat ho toh dusray program ya health professional ke liye referral lein. Dusri ray hasil karne ke tareeqay ke liye HealthLinkBC ki factsheet www.healthlinkbc.ca par dekhein. Mental illness ki tashkhees ko manage karne aur health care professionals ke sath achi tarah kaam karne ke liye HeretoHelps Managing a Mental Illness series dekhein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mental Filtering kya hai
answer: Ek ghalat fehmi jahan mareez halat ke tamam acha pehluon ko nazar karta hai aur sirf aik manfi pehlu par tawajju deta hai.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Prosopagnosia kya hai
answer: Ek khaas neurocognitive masla jisme aam insani chehray pehchan ne mein nakami hoti hai, jo aksar fusiform gyrus ke nuqsan ki wajah se hota hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Zehrili kaam ki jagah ko behtareen tareeke se kaise handle kiya jaye?
answer: Sab kuch document karein, sakht professional hudood muqarrar karein, aur apni mojooda performance barqarar rakhte hue ek sehatmand kaam ki jagah talaash karna shuru karein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Conversion Disorder kya hai
answer: Aisi haalat jis mein voluntary motor ya sensory function mein tabdeeli hoti hai jo ke kisi maani khaiz neurological ya medical waja se bayan nahi ki ja sakti.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Are you a doctor
answer: Nahi, main aik AI model hoon. Mere jawab sirf maloomati maqsad ke liye hain aur clinical checkup ki jagah nahi le sakte.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Support group dhundhne ke liye mein kahan ja sakta hoon?
answer: Bohat se log peer support ko ek madadgar zaria samajhte hain jo unke recovery mein madadgar hota hai. Kai organizations mojood hain jo consumer, unke khandan walon aur doston ke liye support groups offer karti hain. Kuch support groups peer-led hotay hain, jabke doosray zehni sehat ke professional ke qiyadat mein ho sakte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Kya zehni sehat ke masail ko roka ja sakta hai?
answer: Hum sab zehni sehat ke challenges se guzra sakte hain, lekin apni behbood, resilience ko barhawa dena aur jaldi madad hasil karna mushkilat ko gehra hone se rok sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Agnosia kya hai
answer: Hawas ke izharat jese jan-pehchan cheezen ya chehray pehchan ne ki nakami, jabke hawasi aalaat durust hon.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Aap kaise hain?
answer: Main theek hoon. Main ek AI assistant hoon jo aapke zehni sehat aur psychiatry se related sawalat ke jawab dene ke liye hoon.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Somnambulism kya hai
answer: Aisi halat jo aam tor par sleepwalking ke naam se jani jati hai, jisme neend ke dauran baar baar bistar se uth kar be wajah chalna phirna hota hai aur chehra be tasveer hota hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: Avolition kya hai
answer: Ek shadid manfi alamat jo bilkul drive, motivation, ya andarooni koshish ke baghair goal directed saragarmi mein mashgool hone ki salahiyat ki kami ko zahir karti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Dissociative Amnesia kya hai
answer: Ahm autobiographical maloomat yaad na rakh pane ki salahiyat ka na hona, aam bhool se alag aur aam tor par traumatic ya stressful nature ka hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mein therapy jaate rehne ke liye apni motivation kaise barqarar rakh sakta hoon?
answer: Isay apne zehan ke liye gym samjho. Taraqqi hamesha seedhi line mein nahi hoti, lekin mustaqil koshish se lambi muddat mein khaas taraqqi hoti hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Claustrophobia kya hai
answer: Ek maqami anxiety phobia jo chhoti, band, ya bhari jagaon mein phansne ka shadid aur be-wajeh khauf hota hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: Cortisol kya hai
answer: Cortisol adrenal glands ke cortex se secret hone wala ek aham glucocorticoid hormone hai jo physiological metabolic stress response ko coordinate karta hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Main negative soch ke spiral ko kaise rok sakta hoon?
answer: Apne jism ko physically hilao, walk per jao ya jis kamre mein ho usay badlo taake zehni loop toot jaye aur apni tawajju dobara hasil karo.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Doosri local services dhundhne ke liye mein kahan ja sakta hoon?
answer: Aapke community mein zehni sehat ke ilaaj ke liye madad dene wale kayi resources mojood honge. Yeh resources aapko sahi therapist dhoondhne mein madad kar sakte hain, aur ilaaj ke options aur process ko behtar samajhne mein madadgar sabit ho sakte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Asociality kya hai
answer: Ek bunyadi manfi alamat jo samaji rabtay mein shirkat ki puri kami aur tanha saragarmiyon ki qawi pasandidgi ko zahir karti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Schizoid personality disorder kya hai?
answer: Personality disorder soch, ehsaas, aur rawaiyat ka aisa nizam hai jo lambi muddat tak rehta hai aur kisi na kisi qisam ka masla ya takleef paida karta hai. Schizoid personality disorder ya SPD samaji rabt aur talluqaat ko mutasir karta hai. SPD walay log dusron se talluq banane aur jazbaat zahir karne mein mushkilat mehsoos karte hain. Wo qareebi talluqaat se parhaiz karte hain aur aksar akelay waqt guzarna pasand karte hain, jis se wo apne qareebi rishtedaron ke liye door nazar aate hain. Bohat se log shiddat wale jazbaat jaise gussa par reakshan nahi dete, chahe dusre unhain provok karne ki koshish karen. Bahar se SPD walay log thande ya aloof lag sakte hain, kam jazbat zahir karte hain. Halanke unka naam milta julhta hai, schizoid personality disorder schizophrenia jaisa nahi hai. Samajha jata hai ke schizoid personality disorder qaleel logon mein paaya jata hai. Kuch log ise apni shakhsiyat ka hissa samajhte hain, lekin dusre social milap mein bohat takleef mehsoos karte hain. Kuch dawaein madadgar ho sakti hain aur psychotherapy se log naye skills hasil kar sakte hain aur talluqaat behtar bana sakte hain. Schizoid personality disorder ke liye madad lene ke liye apne family doctor se raabta karein ya psychologist dhundhein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Jab main udaas mehsoos karta hoon to apni tawajjoh kaise behtar kar sakta hoon?
answer: Pomodoro technique istemal karein: 25 minute kaam karein aur 5 minute araam. Har bara kaam chhote aur manage karne walay qadam mein taqseem karein.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Inpatient care ke liye mein kahan ja sakta hoon?
answer: Agar aap ya aap jante hain koi crisis mein hai, to inpatient care madadgar ho sakta hai. Inpatient care logon ko nayi davaon par stabilize hone, naye symptoms ke mutabiq adjust hone, ya zaroorat ki madad hasil karne mein madad karta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Achanak panic attack ke dauran main kaise cope kar sakta hoon?
answer: Apni saans par poori tawajju dein. Apni naak se ahista se saans lein aur apne munh se is se bhi zyada ahista saans chhodein jab tak ye guzar na jaye.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Somatic Delusion kya hai
answer: Apni jisam ki sakht bunyad ya shakl ke mutaliq aik mustaqil ghalat yaqeen, jaise ke yeh samajhna ke aaza zard ya sadh rahe hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Why do I need to keep informed?
answer: It may be tempting to try to block out the world altogether to avoid bad news, but its important to keep yourself informed. We all have to step up during a pandemic because we all have a part to play in reducing the spread of the virus. Its important that you know what must be done and how you should do it. This is important for the health of your neighbours and your own mental health, and taking action can help counter difficult feelings like hopelessness and despair. One study from people in China found that people who had reliable up-to-date information about the coronavirus and COVID-19 illness and accurate instructions on how they should act such as instructions around hand-washing and wearing a mask felt more resilient and felt better able to handle the virus. People who received good, accurate information reported lower levels of stress, anxiety, and depression. Staying informed does not mean that you have to follow the news all day. Check in a few times a day, sticking to trusted sources and media outlets. While social media can be a great way to keep in touch with family and friends, social media can also amplify bad advice, vague or untrue stories, and other unhelpful information. Be sure to use good critical thinking skills.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Oculogyric Crisis kya hai
answer: Ek achanak dystonic reaction jo be-ikhyaar, musalsal upar ki taraf aankhon ke rujhan par mushtamil hota hai, aam tor par typical antipsychotics se hota hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Visual Hallucination kya hai
answer: Aisi sensory tajurba jo cheezen, log, naqshaye ya roshni ke chamak dekhne ka hota hai jo haqeeqat mein asal physical mojoodgi nahi rakhti.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Dopamine ka dimagh mein kya kirdar hai
answer: Dopamine ek bunyadi neurotransmitter ke taur par kaam karta hai jo reward pathways, motor coordination, motivation, aur executive decision structures ko chalata hai.
reference: Lancet Psychiatry Clinical Evidence Database

question: Incongruent Affect kya hai
answer: Aisi jazbati izhar jo mareez ke alfazi khayalat ya foran halat ke mutabiq bilkul mutabqat nahi rakhti.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Time-blindness ya ADHD se related stress ko main kaise manage karoon?
answer: Bahari visual timers istimal karein, har cheez ke liye phone reminders set karein, aur kisi aur ke saath kaam karke body doubling karein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Formication kya hai
answer: Ek khaas tactile hallucination jo bohat chust aur takleef deh ahsas deta hai ke keeday poori jild par ya jild ke neeche chal rahe hon.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Antidepressants mein kya farq hai?
answer: Antidepressant dawaiyon ki kai qisamien hain, aur har ek mukhtalif tareeqay se kaam karti hai. Antidepressants classes mein taqseem hoti hain jo unke amal aur dimaagh ke chemical messengers (neurotransmitters) par asar andaz hone ke taur tareeqay par mabni hoti hain. Har class mein kai medications ho sakte hain jinke kaam karne ke tareeqay thode farq rakhte hain. Neeche kuch aam classes aur unke aam medications diye gaye hain. Pehla naam generic naam hai aur brackets mein brand name diya gaya hai. SSRIs ya selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors: fluoxetine (Prozac), paroxetine (Paxil), citalopram (Celexa), escitalopram (Cipralex), aur sertraline (Zoloft). SNRIs ya serotonin and norepinephrine reuptake inhibitors: venlafaxine (Effexor) aur duloxetine (Cymbalta). NDRIs ya norepinephrine-dopamine reuptake inhibitors: bupropion (Wellbutrin aur Zyban). NaSSAs ya noradrenergic and specific serotonergic antidepressants: mirtazapine (Remeron), jo tetracyclic antidepressant (TeCa) bhi kaha jata hai. SARIs ya serotonin antagonist and reuptake inhibitors: trazodone (Desyrel). Dusri antidepressant classes jaise MAOIs aur tricyclics hain jo purani aur ziada side effects aur restrictions wali hoti hain. In ko tab prescribe kia jata hai jab naye antidepressants asar na karain. Dusri dawaiyan jaise lithium, thyroid medications, ya antipsychotics bhi aksar antidepressants ke sath prescribe ki jati hain taake asar barhaya ja sake. Antidepressants sirf depression hi nahi balki anxiety disorders jaise dusre illnesses ke liye bhi prescribed hoti hain. Sirf medical doctors jaise family doctors ya psychiatrists antidepressants prescribe kar sakte hain. Agar doctor aapko antidepressants consider karne ka mashwara deta hai, to yaad rakhein ke ziada tar logon ko sahi medication tak pohanchne ke liye kai options try karne parte hain. Yeh frustrating ho sakta hai khaas tor par jab aap bimar mehsoos karte hain, magar sahi medication dhoondhna zaruri hai. Side effects aur faide logon ke darmiyan kafi farq karte hain, aur medication kaisa kaam karega predict karna mushkil hai baghair istemal kiye. Har shakhs ka response mukhtalif hota hai. Apni health care team ke sath apni medication ke bare mein lagaataar guftagu bohat zaruri hai taake aap kisi masle ya chinta par baat kar sakein ya apne khas antidepressant ke kaam ke tareeqay ko samajh saken.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Kyun si alamatain hain jo bataen ke mujhe psychiatrist se milni chahiye?
answer: Agar aapke alamat aapko kaam, neend ya khanay se rok rahe hon, ya agar aapko khud ko nuqsan pohanchanay ke khayalat hain to foran madad hasil karein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Body Dysmorphic Disorder kya hai
answer: Ek aisi beemari jisme shakhs apni jismani soorat mein ek ya zyada perceived defects ya nuqsan ki fikr karta hai jo doosron ko nazar nahi aate.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mein zehni sehat ke ilaaj ke kismon ke baare mein kahan seekh sakta hoon?
answer: Zehni sehat ki haalat aksar dawa, terapi ya dono ke combination se ilaaj ki jati hai. Lekin, mukhtalif qism ke ilaaj dastiyab hain, jin mein Complementary Alternative Treatments, khud madad ke plan, aur hum umar madad shamil hain. Ilaaj bohat zaati hotay hain aur un par jis shakhs ko zehni sehat ki takleef hai aur uski team ke saath baat cheet honi chahiye.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Agar main ilaaj mein shamil ho jaoon, toh mujhe kya jaanna chahiye?
answer: Ilaaj shuru karna afrad aur unke khandan ke liye ek bara qadam hota hai, is liye yeh kabir sabh ho sakta hai. Yeh zaruri hai ke ilaj ke amal mein jyada se jyada hissa liya jaye aur muta'alliq riport aur sawalat ke jawab lein. Kuch sawal jo aapko pus'ne honge un mein shamil hain: Is bemari ki wajah ke mutalliq kya malumat hain? Kya aur tashkhis hain jahan yeh alamat aam hain? Kya aam tor par physical ya neurological imtehan shamil hota hai? Kya is waqt kuch aur tests ya imtehanat ki sifarish karte hain? Kya aap is moqay par satuh azad rai mashwara dain gey? Is tashkhis ke liye kaunsa ilaj ka program behtareen mana jata hai? Kya is program mein dusre specialists ki khidmat bhi shamil hogi? Agar haan, to in khidmat ka tanzim kon karega? Khandan ki is program mein kifayat kya samjhte hain? Khandan ko ilaj faraham karne walon se kitna dakhl-e-rasi hasil hoga? Iss tashkhis ke liye aam tor par kaunsi dawayein istimal ki jati hain? Is bemari ke ilaaj mein aapka tajarba kitna hai? Main ilaj mein aapki madad ke liye kya karsakta hoon?
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Dystonia kya hai
answer: Ek extrapyramidal side effect jo ke achanak, be-ikhyaar, aur musalsal muscle contractions par mushtamil hota hai jo ghalat posture majboor karta hai, aksar gardan ya aankhon mein.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Delirium kya hai
answer: Tawajju, agahi, aur bunyadi shaoor mein aik acuti khalal jo chhote arsay mein develop hota hai aur sakhti mein utar chadhav karta rehta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: CBD oil ki qanooni haisiyat aur saboot kya hai?
answer: Cannabidiol ya CBD cannabis ka ek fitri mukaamal hai. Yeh cannabis ke poday se nikala jata hai aur aksar tail ki shakal mein istemaal ke liye tayar kiya jata hai. CBD psychoactive nahi hai, aur THC tetrahydrocannabinol ki tarah jo cannabis ka primary psychoactive element hai, woh nas nahi deta. CBD Canada mein qanooni hai aur mukhtalif tibi haalat ke ilaaj mein istemaal kiya jata hai. Tamam cannabinoids, CBD samait, jism mein kuch receptors se lag kar asrat paida karte hain jo dimagh ya immune system mein hote hain. Insani jism bhi apne cannabinoids paida karta hai. Lagta hai ke CBD seedha receptors se nahi jurtata. Is ke bajaaye, yeh jism ko apne cannabinoids zyada istemaal karne ki hidayat deta hai taa ke wo CBD se mutaliq ilaj ke asrat paida kar sakein. Tehqeeq se lagta hai ke CBD chronic dard mein rahat de sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: How do I deal with someone telling me what to do?
answer: Some people may advise you on good evidence of what works with the best of intentions, but its important to find out what works best for you.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Zehni sehat kya hai?
answer: Hum sab ki zehni sehat hoti hai jo hamari aqeedat, khayalat, jazbaat aur rawaiye par mushtamil hoti hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Cognitive Distortion kya hai
answer: Ek exaggerated, biased ya bilkul ghair mansookh soch ka nizam jo haqeeqat ko galat samajhta hai aur depression ko barhawa deta hai.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Phobia kya hai
answer: Ek be-buniyad, shadid, aur musalsal dar jo kisi khaas cheez, janwar, ya maholiati surat-e-haal se hota hai aur asal khatra ke muqablay mein zyada barhawa deta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Psychiatrist aur registered psychologist mein kya farq hai?
answer: Psychiatrist ek medical doctor hota hai jise zehni sehat ka extra training mila hota hai jo dawa prescribe kar sakta hai. Kuch psychiatrists psychotherapeutic therapies jaise cognitive-behavioural therapy istemal karte hain zehni sehat ke masail ka ilaaj karne ke liye. Kai psychiatrists hospitals, clinics, ya health centres mein kaam karte hain, aur kuch private office bhi chalate hain. Kyun ke wo specialist doctors hain, to aksar aapko psychiatrist se milne ke liye dusre doctor ka referral chahiye hota hai, aur fees bhi lagti hai. Registered psychologist mukhtalif counselling ya talk therapy approaches par tawajju deta hai, magar dawa prescribe nahi karta. Unke paas psychology mein graduate degrees hoti hain. Registered psychologists tak access do tarah se hota hai: public aur private system. Public system mein registered psychologists hospitals ya schools mein kaam karte hain. Kuch programs mein referral chahiye hota hai aur fees MSP ke zariye covered hoti hain. Magar aksar log private system se registered psychologists tak ponchtay hain. Private psychologist ko seedha contact kar sakte hain bina referral ke. Private counsellors ki fees MSP cover nahin karta, lekin employee health plans cover kar sakte hain. Registered psychologists ki fees ghante ke hisaab se farq hoti hai, aur kuch low income walon ke liye kam fees offer karte hain. Aksar farq isi mein hota hai ke aap kaise paisa dete hain aur professionals ki taleem kaisi hai. Treatment aur care mein sab se aham cheez wo professional hai jo aapke maqsad ko support karta ho. Kya aap treatment mein dawa fine-tune karne pe focus karte hain? Kya aap kis therapy approach ki talash mein hain? Kya professional ki care ki philosophy samajh aati hai? Kya aap us se baat karte hue mehfooz mehsoos karte hain? Akhirkar, aapka rishta professional ke sath sab se zaruri hai. Designation par tawajju dene ki bajaye, apni zaruraton aur umeedon ke mutabik professional dhoondein. Apne family doctor se mashwara karein aur unki rai lein. Local mental health organizations se madad lein. Provincial organizations jo HeretoHelp ke peeche hain ke zariye local branches dhoondein. Community health centre, outpatient psychiatry program ya mental health team se mashwara lein. Apne qareebi psychiatrists ki list ke liye College of Physicians and Surgeons of British Columbia ke Find a Physician Tool mein Specialist ke zariye search karein, magar yad rahe ke pehle doctor ke referral ki zarurat hoti hai jaise apke family doctor se.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Thought Withdrawal kya hai
answer: Ghalat aqeedah ke kisi baahir wali quwwat ya machine aapke zehan se khayalat chura rahi hai ya nikaal rahi hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mujhe aur kahan madad mil sakti hai?
answer: Madad ke liye jahan jana hai woh masla aur alamat ke fitrat par munhasir hota hai aur jo aapke liye behtareen manah hota hai. Aksar, behtareen jagah hai kisi aise shakhs se baatcheet karna jise aap bharosa karte hain, jaise ghar walay, dost, mazhabi rehnuma, sehat ke provider, ya dusre professionals. Samaji himayat zeheni bemari se shifa ke liye zaruri hai, aur aap unse un professionals ke hawale ya rehnmai maang sakte hain. Apne ilaqe mein zeheni sehat ke wasail dhoondein. Dusri baat, Nebraska mein log aur jagahen hain jo baat karne, sunne, aur aap ke safar mein madad faraham karte hain. Tisri baat, bohat se log apne peer support ko madadgar samajhte hain jo unki recovery mein madad karta hai. Mukhtalif tanzimaat support groups faraham karti hain jo mazurin, unke ghar walon, aur doston ke liye hoti hain. Kuch support groups peer led hote hain jabke dusre zeheni sehat ke professional ke qabuat mein hote hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Alexia kya hai
answer: Ek haasil shuda neurological disorder hai jo likhi hui matn ko parhnay ki salahiyat kho dene se pehchana jata hai, aksar cerebral vascular stroke ki wajah se hota hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Neuroleptic Malignant Syndrome kya hai
answer: Zindagi ke liye khatarnak zehni emergency jo antipsychotic use se hoti hai, jisme shadid muscle ka sakhti, jism ka zyada garam hona, aur badan ke apne nizam ka be intezami hota hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Obsessive-compulsive personality disorder kya hai?
answer: Personality disorder soch, ehsaas, aur rawaiyat ka aisa nizam hai jo lambi muddat tak rehta hai aur kisi na kisi qisam ka masla ya takleef paida karta hai. Obsessive-compulsive personality disorder ya OCPD control ke baray mein hai. OCPD walay log bohat sakht soch rakhte hain aur har cheez ko munazzam, perfect, aur apni tareeqay se karne ki tawaqqo rakhte hain. Yeh zindagi ki dusri ahm cheezon, jese rishtay, ki qurbani par hota hai. Kaam zindagi ke har hissa par sab se ahem ho sakta hai, aur OCPD walay log bohat dedicated nazar aate hain magar perfectionism ki wajah se kaam mukammal nahi kar pate. Wo dusron ko zimmedari dene mein mushkilat mehsoos karte hain aur dusron ke kaam par bharosa nahi karte. OCPD walay log uncertainty bardasht nahi kar sakte aur duniya ko bohat sakhti se samajhte hainkuch ya to sahi hai ya ghalat. Wo apne liye ya dusron ke liye paise kharch karne mein bhi mushkilat mehsoos karte hain aur hoarding ki shikayat bhi karte hain, yaani apne ghar ki cheezein phenk nahi pate. Neatness ya order ki khwahish aur cheezein na phenk paye ki wajah se anxiety ho sakti hai. Jabke obsessive-compulsive personality disorder aur obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD) ke naam milte hain, lekin yeh alag alag marz hain. OCD walay log aksar jante hain ke unki obsessions aur compulsions be-maani hain aur bohat pareshaan rehte hain, halaanke wo obsessions ya compulsions rok nahi pate. Compulsions anxiety kum karne ki koshish hote hain, lutf lene ke liye nahi. OCPD walay log apne khayalat ko apni shaksiat ka hissa samajhte hain, apne khayalat ko logical samajhte hain, aur compulsive kaam mukammal kar ke lutf ya faida mehsoos karte hain. Wo control hasil na kar paane ya perfectionism na haasil kar paane par bohat takleef mehsoos karte hain. Obsessive-compulsive personality disorder sab se aam personality disorders mein se ek hai. Ilaaj mein psychotherapy, dawaa, aur self-help strategies shamil ho sakti hain. OCPD ke liye madad lene ke liye apne family doctor se raabta karein ya psychologist dhundhein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Executive dysfunction kya hai?
answer: Executive dysfunction aik neurocognitive kharabi hai jo memory, tawajjo, mansuba bandi, aur maqsad par mabni task shuru karne ki salahiyat ko nuqsan pohanchati hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Psychoeducation kya hai
answer: Mareezon aur un ke khandan ko tashkhees, prognosis, aur coping tools ke mutaliq mukammal maloomat dene ki munazzam clinical riwayat.
reference: National Alliance on Mental Illness Educational Handbook

question: Acrophobia kya hai
answer: Ek bohat aam specific anxiety disorder jo unchaiyon ya unchai se neeche dekhne ke shadid aur nuqsan pohnchanay wala khauf se mutaliq hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: Hypnopompic Hallucination kya hai
answer: Ek ghalat sensory ehsas jo neend se jaagne ke foran waqt hota hai, jo sleep paralysis se gehri taur par juda hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Major Neurocognitive Disorder kya hai
answer: Woh haalat jo pehle dementia ke naam se jani jati thi, jisme aik ya zyada zehni salahiyat ke maydanon mein pehle se kafi girawat hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: EMDR therapy kya hai
answer: Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing ek aisi method hai jo bilateral sensory tracking use kar ke dimaagh ko traumatic yaadon ko mehfooz tor par process karne mein madad deti hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Main apne bachon ko drugs istimaal na karne ke liye kaise manaa sakta hoon?
answer: Aap nahi kar sakte. Lekin aap un ki is salahiyat ko mutasir kar sakte hain ke wo achi choice karen ek aise duniya mein jaha alcohol aur doosre drugs dastiyab hain. Yeh madad karne ka tareeqa hai ke aap apne bache mein aise skills paida karen jo unhe zindagi ke maqsadon ko hasil karne mein madad dein. Yeh supportive rishta banane ke liye bhi zaroori hai taake wo mushkilaat ya sawaalat ke liye aap ke paas ja sakain. Drugs ke baare mein guftagu shuru karna aapke aur aapke bache ke rishtay ko mazboot bana sakta hai. Bataana aur khula, imaandaar guftagu mumkin banana aapke bache ko yeh yaqeen dilata hai ke jo wo soch rahe hain, mehsoos kar rahe hain aur tajurba kar rahe hain woh aapke liye ahmiyat rakhta hai. Maqsad yeh hai ke aapka bacha baat kare aur apne khayalat aur jazbaat share kare. Jab jawaan logon se sawalat kiye jate hain jo unke khayalat explore karne par majboor karte hain, to yeh unhein apne khayalat aur rawaiyye ke mutaliq dilchaspi deta hai. Yeh self-reflection ka amal hai jo critical sochne ke skills ka hissa hai jo acha faisla karne mein madadgar hai. Critical thinking skills asl mein drugs istemaal se mutaliq khatarat ko kam karne ka zaroori hissa hain. Jab jawaan log koi baat ghour se samajh lete hain, to wo impulse ya influence par amal karne ke bajaye zyada soch samajh kar faisla karte hain. Alcohol ya doosre drugs par baat cheet shuru karne ke liye koi qanoon nahin hai ke kahan se shuru karna chahiye. Chhote bachay bhi jante hain ke drugs humari tehzeeb ka hissa hain. Wo apne gird logon ko sharaab peete dekhte hain aur TV ya advertising mein drugs ke samnay aate hain. Yeh ek aisi mozu hai jo kudrati taur par uthane wale mauqon par mustamal ho sakta hai jaise ke family ke jashan ke liye tayari karte waqt, jab alcohol hota hai, ya agar aap kisi rishtedar ke ghar ja rahe hain jo tobacco istemaal karta ho, ya dinner table ke dauran rozmarra ki kahaniyan share karte waqt. Jawaan log aur naujawaanon se drugs par baat karna jab wo barhapa ki taraf rukh kar rahe hote hain, unhe apne zaati mayar banane, risk kam karne aur mashhoor aqeedon ka tanqeedi taur par jayza lene mein madad deta hai. Yeh khas taur par zaroori ho sakta hai jab wo alcohol ya cannabis ke liye qanuni umar par pohanchte hain aur ghar se alag ho jate hain. Jab ke naujawaan zyada azad aur qanooni huqooq rakhte hain, walidain abhi bhi ek mohim dari board ki tarah unke khayalat aur ideas par tajzia karne ke liye mohemmi kirdar ada kar sakte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Cannabis ki legal umar 19 hai lekin kuch doctor groups kehte hain ke yeh umar 25 tak nuksan deh ho sakti hai. Kya ye har istemal mei nuksan hai ya kisi khaas istemal mein? Asliyat aur afwah mein kya farq hai? Agar main walid hoon toh apne jawan bache ko kya kahun?
answer: Cannabis ke istemal ke faide aur nuqsanat dono mumkin hain. Jawan log cannabis aur doosre psychoactive drugs istemal karte hain taake acha mehsoos kar saken, behtari mehsoos karen, ya explore karen. Tawajo dein ke curiosity, tajraba karne ya doston ke saath socializing ke dauraan moderate istemal hota hai aur nuqsan kam hota hai. Jab cannabis rozana zindagi ke masail se cope karne, pareshani mehsoos karne, ya social group mein fit hone ke liye istemal hota hai toh nuqsan ke zyada imkaan hain. Yeh is liye ke aise log zaidatar barambar aur bhaari dose lete hain, potential nuqsanat per kam sochte hain aur coping ke alternatives jaise ke kisi adult se baat karna ya physical activity kam karte hain. Research se pata chalta hai ke jitni jawani mein shuru karte hain aur jitna zyada istemal karte hain utna nuksan barhta hai. BC mein cannabis ki kanooni umar 19 saal hai. Lekin dimaag 25 saal tak puri tareh develop nahin hota. Cannabis ko tawajjo ke sath use karna ya use der tak taalna brain ke nuqsanat ko kam kar sakta hai. Kuch log jinhain serious aur mustaqil mental health masail ka khatra ho, unko cannabis se parhez karna chahiye. Yeh chhoti group mein psychosis aur schizophrenia ka risk barha deta hai. Kuch logon ne kaha hai ke cannabis ne unki anxiety ya stress kam karne mein madad ki. Jaise aam surat mein, cannabis ke faide aur nuqsanat ka tawazun young logon ke liye bohat zaruri hai jin mein serious mental health masail hain. Drug mixing, jaise cannabis aur alcohol saath lena nuqsanat barha sakta hai. Is se intoxication zyada aur der tak rehta hai aur jawan iska effect samajh nahi pata. Aksar ham kehte hain, 'Na zyada, na zyada barambar, sirf safe context mein' yeh simple tareeqa hai kisi bhi psychoactive substance ke istemal ke liye. Walid ya caring adult ke roop mein open aur respectful taluq jawan ke saath sab se achi cheez hai aur substance use ke nuqsanat rokne ka behtareen tareeqa. Bachay ko yeh batana ke wo kabhi bhi aap ke paas cannabis, doosre substances, ya kisi aur maslay par baat karne aa sakte hain, yeh batata hai ke wo aap ke liye ahmiyat rakhte hain aur aap unhe sun'ne aur samajhne ko tayar hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Gambling Disorder kya hai
answer: Musalsal aur dhohrate hue problematic gambling ka rawayya jo clinically aham nuqsan ya pareshani ki taraf le jata hai, jisme rok nahi paana khaas pehchan hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Digital burnout ki alamat kya hain?
answer: Musalsal ankhon ka thakan, mobile se door rehne par pareshaani mehsoos karna, aur online kaam ya samaji tasks mein puri taur par energy ka na hona.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Circumstantial Speech kya hai
answer: Aisi guftagu ka andaaz jismey be-had, bore karne wale aur ghair zaroori tafseelat shamil hoti hain jo aakhir kar asal ghaat-e-maktoob tak pohanchti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Main apne khud ko bekaar samajhne ke ehsaas se kaise nipattoon?
answer: Apne aap se dosti ka ravayya ikhtiyar karen. Manfi self-talk ko apni purani kamyabiyaan ke haqiqat ke saath challenge karen.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Sleep hygiene kya hai
answer: Sleep hygiene ek aisa framework hai jo saboot par mabni sleep environment aur behavior ke qawaid par mabni hota hai taake gehri raat ki neend ko mazboot banaya ja sake.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: Mujhe khudkushi ke khayalat hain, ya kisi apne se koi khudkushi ke baare mein baat kar raha hai. Main kya karun?
answer: Khudkushi ke khayalat hona ya yeh sunna ke koi aapke qarib hai jisme khudkushi ke khayalat hain, darawana ho sakta hai. Khudkushi ke khayalat ka matlab yeh nahin ke koi apni zindagi khatam karega, magar yeh is baat ki nishani hai ke unhe extra madad ya support ki zarurat hai. Agar aapde khud khudkushi ke khayalat hain toh apne doctor ya mental health service provider se zarur baat karen. Agar aap kisi aur ki madad kar rahe hain, toh unhein madad lenay par encourage karen. 'Coping With Suicidal Thoughts' ek acha resource hai jo aapko mushkil feelings ko samajhnay aur handle karne mein madad karta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Agar support madad na kare to mein kya karoon?
answer: Mushkil ho sakta hai wo cheezen dhundhna jo aap ki madad karengi, kyun ke mukhtalif cheezen mukhtalif logon ke liye madadgar hoti hain. Yeh zaruri hai ke aap mukhtalif approaches ke liye khula dimaag rakhein aur sahi madad dhundhne ke liye pur-azm rahain, aur umeed barqarar rakhein, chahe kuch cheezen kaam na karein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: How can I reframe the situation and find more balanced perspectives?
answer: How you think about something impacts your feelings and your behaviours. When we feel stressed out, angry, or fearful, its hard to look at the situation realistically and see all of the options we have. Remember we all control our own actions and reactions, no matter whats going on in the world. We can call do something about this pandemic. People often overestimate the negative partstheir own feelings, their own abilities to manage a difficult situation, or the situation itselfand underestimate positive partstheir own abilities to care for themselves and loved ones, their support networks, and opportunities. How does the thought Were never going to make it through this make you feel? It likely doesnt feel goodand it isnt even true. Challenging negative, unhelpful thoughts can improve your mood, validate your ability to get through this, and help you see new options or opportunities to stay well. Stop and notice thoughts that come up. How do they make you feel? Do your thoughts seem realistic if you look at the situation more objectively? How can you reframe the thought to make it more productive or hopeful? Can you find any positive aspects or think of new ways to approach the situation? Here are a few example Im so mad that my event was cancelled This sucks I know this is the safer option for everyone. When its rescheduled, Ill enjoy it more because I wont have to worry about getting sick or spreading the illness. I hate spending so much time at home. This is so boring. Im doing my part to keep my neighbours safe. Its worth it because it keeps people healthy. Im having a hard time getting used to my new schedule. This is so frustrating. Ill get used to this soon, just like I adapted the last time I had to change my schedule. Now that Im home more, Ill have more time to finish the projects I havent touched in months and Im excited to see the end results. Im really scared and I dont know what to do. I feel so overwhelmed right now. It makes sense that I feel scaredpeople are getting sick and we dont know when things will go back to normal. But there are a lot of things I can do to keep healthy, and Im going to do some research so I can do my best. When I focus on the things I can do, everything feels more manageable. Were going to be stuck inside forever. Im already sick of this. I understand that it will take some time to manage COVID-19, and I trust that health care professionals and scientists are working as fast as they can. I know this will end eventually and life will go back to normal. The goal is not to ignore the bad or uncomfortable parts of the situation or deny that theres a problem. Instead, this exercise can help you understand the situation more realistically and see the parts that you can control right now.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Agar mujhe lage ke main har cheez mein nakaam ho raha hoon toh mujhe kya karna chahiye?
answer: Aaj ki kisi ek chiz ko pehchano jo tumne achi tarah ki, chahe woh chhoti hi kyu na ho. Kamyabi ko perfection achieve karne ki bajaye sirf maujood rehne ke taur par dekho.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: PTSD walay partner ki madad main kaise karoon?
answer: Un ke triggers ke baray mein taleem hasil karen, waqton mein sabr se kaam len aur unko unke therapy plan par amal karne ke liye hosla den.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Main jawan hoon aur mere walidain mein se ek ko zehni bemari hai. Main kya kar sakta hoon?
answer: Kisi aur ki illness aapki galti nahin hai. Aap yeh bhi control nahin kar sakte ke wo shakhs kaise mehsoos karta hai, unki illness ya unka amal. Aap apna khayal rakh sakte hain. Apne parents ki illness ke bare mein zyada janna madadgar ho sakta hai taake aap samajh sakein ke wo kya guzarte hain. Is website par aap mental illnesses par asaani se padhne wale booklets aur lambi info sheets paa sakte hain. Apna khayal rakhna bhi bohat zaruri hai. Bohat se log jab koi walid behaal ho to mix jazbat mehsoos karte hain, jaise gussa, sharm, darr ya aur bohat kuch. Yeh jazbat aapke apne aap aur dusron ke baray mein sochnay ka tareeqa badal sakti hain. Jab aap hawai jahaaz mein ho aur flight attendants safety demonstration karain, toh wo kehte hain ke pehle apna oxygen mask lagao, phir dusron ki madad karo. Yeh is liye ke aap jo khud theek nahin hon unki madad nahi kar sakte. Yahan kuch programs hain jo sirf jawan logon ke liye hain: BC Schizophrenia Society ka Kids in Control Support Group Program jo 8-18 saal ke bachon aur jawano ko mental illnesses samajhne, challenges se cope karne aur apni sehat ka khayal rakhne mein madad karta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Illusion kya hai
answer: Ek hoshyaar dosh ya ghalat tafseer hai jo asal mein mojood kisi haqeeqi physical stimulus ka hota hai, jese ke coat ko insan samajhna.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy kya hai
answer: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy ek makhsoos rawaiyaati ilaj hai jo mareezon ko unke zehni ghalat fehmiyon ki pehchan karne aur door karne mein madad deti hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Zeheniat ki sehat ke liye volunteering karne ke kya faiday hain?
answer: Ye maqsad ka ehsaas deta hai, samaji talluq barhata hai, aur fardi fikr se tawajju dosron ki madad par shift karta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Aap kya kar rahe hain?
answer: Main data inputs process kar raha hoon taake psychology aur diagnosis ke meyar ke mutaliq maloomat faraham kar sakoon.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Brocas Aphasia kya hai
answer: Ek non-fluent zabaan ka nikalna jo nuqsan hai jahan samajh bach jati hai magar zabani izhar sakht aur mehnat talab hota hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Prodrome kya hai?
answer: Prodrome ek tibbi istilah hai jo kisi bimaari ya health maslay ke aaghazi nishaniyon ya alamaat ke liye istemal hoti hai jo bari nishaniyon ya symptoms se pehle zahir hoti hain. Psychosis, jo schizophrenia jaisi bemariyon mein paya jata hai, ek aisi bemari hai jiska apna khaas prodrome hota hai. Psychosis ke prodrome mein nishaniyan poori hallucinations aur delusions shuru hone se pehle zahir hoti hain. Prodrome mein aam symptoms shamil hain. Yeh symptoms bohat si dusri zehni bemariyon mein bhi milte hain, is liye aksar samajhna mushkil hota hai ke yeh psychosis ya schizophrenia ka prodrome hai ya kuch aur. Yeh behtareen hota hai ke jab bhi aap apni ya apne kareebi fard ki zehni sehat ko le kar pareshan hon to madad talaash karain. Psychosis aur schizophrenia ko jaldi diagnosis aur ilaaj karna asaan hota hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Jamais Vu kya hai
answer: Wo zehni haal jahan ek bohat mamool surat-e-haal, lafz, ya jagah achanak bilkul ajeeb ya naye tareeqay se mehsoos hoti hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Obsessive-Compulsive Disorder ke clinical markers kya hain
answer: Markers mein persistent, intrusive khayalat shamil hain jo ke sakht behavior loops ke sath hote hain jo temporary distress ko kam karte hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Flight of Ideas kya hai
answer: Aisi tez aur musalsal zubaani guftagu jismey khayalat ek mauzoo se doosray mauzoo par foran chalang lagate hain jo aam tor par be-tarteeb talluqaat ya lafzi mazaaq par mabni hote hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Oppositional Defiant Disorder kya hai
answer: Ek bachpan ka disorder jo gusse ya chidhchidhapan ke mood, behas ya nafarmani wale ravayya, ya badla lene ki soch ka kam az kam chay mahine tak mustaqil pattern hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mutism kya hai
answer: Aise fard mein zabani guftagu ki poori ya qareeban poori kami jo ke alfaaz ke dhawani samat bananay ki sehatmand sakhtiyati salahiyat rakhta ho.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Identification with the Aggressor kya hai
answer: Aik la-shooree difa'i mekhani jis mein maqtul apne dzalaal ke traits ya zehni rawaiye apnata hai taake trauma se bacha rahe.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Transference kya hai
answer: Unconscious feelings, expectations aur interpersonal attitudes jo bachpan ke logon ke liye mehsoos kiye jate thay, unko aaj ke therapist ki taraf shift kar dena.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Social Anxiety Disorder kya hai
answer: Yeh dosron ke samne negative evaluation, sharmindagi ya lookhne ke sath performance ya aaraam da social mulaqaton ke doran intehai dar hai.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Aphasia kya hai
answer: Zabaan ke processing mein haasil shuda nuqsan jo dimag ke makhsoos hissa ke nuqsaan ki wajah se hota hai, jisme samajhna, bolna ya tafra karna mushkil ho jata hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Main apne bachay ki jazbati samajh kaise barha sakta hoon?
answer: Unke jazbaat unke liye naam dein, jaise ke, Aap frustrated lag rahe hain, aur unhe sehatmand tareeqe sikhayen apne jazbaat izhar karne ke.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: How can I challenge thinking traps?
answer: What you tell yourself about a situation affects how you feel and what you do. Sometimes your interpretation of a situation can get distorted and you only focus on the negative aspectsthis is normal and expected. However, when you interpret situations too negatively, you might feel worse. Youre also more likely to respond to the situation in ways that are unhelpful in the long term. These automatic thoughts and assumptions are sometimes called thinking traps. Everyone falls into unbalanced thinking traps from time to time. Youre most likely to distort your interpretation of things when you already feel sad, angry, anxious, depressed or stressed. Youre also more vulnerable to thinking traps when youre not taking good care of yourself, like when youre not eating or sleeping well. Here are some common thinking traps Thinking that a negative situation is part of a constant cycle of bad things that happen. People who overgeneralize often use words like always or never. I was really looking forward to that concert, and now its cancelled. This always happens to me I never get to do fun things Seeing things as only right or wrong, good or bad, perfect or terrible. People who think in black and white terms see a small mistake as a total failure. I wanted to eat healthier, but I ate too many snacks today. This plan is a total failure Saying only negative things about yourself or other people. I made a mistake. Im stupid My boss told me that I made a mistake. My boss is a total jerk Predicting that something bad will happen without any evidence. Ive been doing what I can to stay home and reduce the risks, but I just know that Im going to get sick. Focusing only on the negative parts of a situation and ignoring anything good or positive. I know theres a lot I can do at home, but Im just so sick of this. Everything is terrible. Believing that bad feelings or emotions reflect the situation. I feel scared and overwhelmed right now, so that must mean everything is very bad and will never get better. Telling yourself how you should or must act. I should be able to handle this without getting upset and crying Here are helpful strategies to challenge common thinking traps. Many people find their mood and confidence improve after working through these skills. You can also find worksheets to help you go through each step at www.heretohelp.bc.ca. Dont try to get out of a thinking trap by just telling yourself to stop thinking that way. This doesnt let you look at the evidence and challenge the thinking trap. When you try and push upsetting thoughts away, they are more likely to keep popping back into your mind. Ask yourself the following questions when something upsetting happens What is the situation? What actually happened? Only include facts that everyone would agree on. What are your thoughts? What are you telling yourself? What are your emotions? How do you feel? What are your behaviours? How are you reacting? What are you doing to cope? Take a look at the thoughts youve listed. Are you using any of the thinking traps and falling into distorted thinking patterns? Its common to fall into more than one thinking trap. Go back to the thinking trap list and identify which ones apply to you and your current situation. The best way to break a thinking trap is to look at your thoughts like a scientist and consider the hard facts. Use the evidence youve collected to challenge your thinking traps. Here are some ways to do that Try to find evidence against the thought. If you make a mistake at work, you might automatically think, I cant do anything right I must be a terrible employee When this thought comes up, you might challenge it by asking, Is there any evidence to support this thought? Is there any evidence to disprove this thought? You might quickly realize that your boss has complimented your work recently, which doesnt support the idea that youre a bad employee. Ask yourself, Would I judge other people if they did the same thing? Am I being harder on myself than I am on other people? This is a great method for challenging thinking traps that involve harsh self-criticism. Find out whether other people you trust agree with your thoughts. For example, you might have trouble with one of your kids and think, Good parents wouldnt have this kind of problem. To challenge this thought, you can ask other parents if theyve ever had any problems with their kids. Test your beliefs in person. For example, if you think that your friends dont care about you, call a few friends and make plans to start a regular video call. If you assumed that they will all say no, you may be pleasantly surprised to hear that they do want to see you. Once you have worked through some challenges, try to think of a more balanced thought to replace the old thinking traps. Lets use the following example I feel sad and overwhelmed. Im having a hard time figuring out what to do. Im the worst I should be able to handle this Labeling Should statements Examine the evidence I have a lot of challenges right now. Im worried about my family and everything seems to change so quickly. Ive successfully handled complicated situations in the past, so I know I can do this. Its okay to feel upset right nowtheres a lot going on. Im going to think about how I got through past situations and see what worked for me. Im trying to do a lot on my own, so Im going to talk to my family so we can make a plan and work together. Try the Healthy Thinking Worksheet at www.heretohelp.bc.ca Check out Anxiety Canadas articles Helpful Thinking and Thinking Traps This page is adapted from Wellness Module 8 Healthy Thinking at www.heretohelp.bc.cawellness-modulewellness-module-8-healthy-thinking.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Anhedonia kya hai
answer: Woh gehri clinical na-tawanai jis mein kisi shakhs ko un funoon ya ehsaasat mein lutf hasil karne ki salahiyat mahsoos nahi hoti jo pehle buhat dilchaspi aur tasalli ka bais thay.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Idea of Reference kya hai
answer: Aisi ghalat tafseer ke mamooli baahir ke waaqiat, mamooli guftagu, ya media ki broadcasts ka bohat zaati aur seedha matlab hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Baloogh shuda ADHD ke nishan kya hain?
answer: Nishaniyon mein shadeed chronic be tawajjo, be intizami, working memory mein kami, bechaini, aur jazbati bezabtgi shamil hain.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Main maali dabao ko kaise samhaal sakta hoon?
answer: Saaf budget banayen, us par tawajjoh dein jo aapke ikhtiyar mein ho, aur maali mashwaray ke liye counselor se rujoo karein taake hasas chaos ko kam kiya ja sake.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Labile Affect kya hai
answer: Ek ghair mamooli jazbati izhar jo tez, achanak, aur be waqat tabdeelion se bharpoor hota hai jo bahari asar se azad hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Auditory Hallucination kya hai
answer: Jab koi kharji awaaz ya awaazon ka sunna mehsoos hota hai jab koi asal acoustic source muhafiz nahi hota, jo schizophrenia ke liye khasa pehchan hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Jab main mushkilat mein hota hoon to madad mangna itna mushkil kyun hota hai?
answer: Badnami aur dosh bane ka khauf aksar raah mein aata hai. Yaad rakhein ke madad mangna kamzori nahi balke taqat ki nishani hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Regression kya hai
answer: Shadeed zehni dabao ke tehat pehle ke zyada mehfooz taraqqiati marhalay ke rawaiti rawaiye ki janib wapsi.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Overgeneralization kya hai
answer: Zeheni ghalati jahan aik akela nakaam ya rad kiye jane wala waqia ki bunyaad par aam tor par manfi natija nikala jata hai.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Defense Mechanism kya hai
answer: Ek ghair shauri zehni hikmat-e-amli jo ego ke zariye anjaam di jati hai taake bechaini paida karne wale na qabool shuda zaati ikhtilafat se shafta maloomat ko mehfooz rakha ja sake.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Suppression kya hai
answer: Shauri aur irade se ki gayi chunaav hai jismein takleef deh khayalat, khwahishat, ya foran jazbat ko maujooda tawajjo se door rakha jata hai takay baad mein unka samna ho sake.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Borderline Personality Disorder ki tashreeh kya hai
answer: Yeh ek mustaqil pattern hai jis mein shadeed interpersonal conflict, unstable self-image, badalta hua mood, aur khud tabah karne wali impulsivity shamil hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Excoriation Disorder kya hai
answer: Skin chhantnay ki beemari jo apni skin ko bar bar chhantnay ki wajah se hoti hai, jis se skin ke zakham aur shadid zaati takleef paida hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Apraxia kya hai
answer: Aik neurological masla jisme aksar insan apni mansuba bandi ya sikhayi hui harkatain karne mein nakam rehta hai jabke uske muscles ki taqat aur raabta saheh hota hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: What is your name
answer: Mera naam MINDWELL hai aur main aap ka automated mental health maloomati database assistant hoon.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Huntingtons Disease kya hai
answer: Ek taraqqi-pazeer, warisati neurodegenerative disorder hai jo motor chorea, zehni girawat, aur barjasta zehni bemari ke alamat ke saath pehchana jata hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Kya zeheni bemari shuda afrad sahi ho sakte hain?
answer: Zeheni bemari se shifa yab hone ke liye jaldi shanasai aur ilaaj bohat zaruri hota hai. Bemari ke fitrat ke mutabiq, mukhtalif moasar ilaj dastiyab hain. Kisi bhi qisam ke ilaj ke liye, zaruri hai ke mutaasir shaks apne recovery process mein full tor par hamil ho aur purjosh rahe. Bohat se zeheni bemari walay afrad jo tashkhis aur ilaaj karwate hain achi response dete hain, halankah kuch log apne alamat wapas aate hue mehsoos karte hain. Aisa hone par bhi, masulah talim aur behtareen intizam ke sath bemari ko qabu karte huway waqi lifetful aur masroof zindagi guzarna mumkin hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Zehni sehat mein dhoop ka kya kirdar hai?
answer: Dhoop Vitamin D aur serotonin ko barhata hai, jo mizaj ki behtari aur sehatmand neend-ke-hosh ke silsile ke liye zaroori hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Panic attack kya hai
answer: Panic attack ek achanak tez khauf ya barhawa discomfort ka daur hai jo chand minute mein apni inteha tak pohanchta hai aur jis se jismani seene mein dard hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: HIV Infection ki wajah se Neurocognitive Disorder kya hai
answer: Ek musannad zehni nuqsan jo seedha insan ke immune deficiency virus ke central nervous system mein takraar ke neurobiological asraat ki wajah se hota hai.
reference: Johns Hopkins Psychiatry Patient Guide

question: Sunday Scaries ya kaam ki fikr se main kaise nibat sakta hoon?
answer: Friday dupahar ko Monday ke liye tayyari karen aur apna Sunday aaram aur aisi mashghalon ke liye mukhasis karen jo kaam se mutalliq na hon.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Delusion of Grandeur kya hai
answer: Aisi barhi, jhooti yaqeen jisme shakhs apne aap ko azeem quwat, shanakht, daulat, khuda jaisa darja, ya kisi mazhabi khuda ke saath khusoosi talluq samajhta ho.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Tangential Speech kya hai
answer: Aisi raabta saazi mein kami jismey guftagu karne wala musalsal asliyat sawal se hat kar mutaliqa mauzoaat par chala jata hai aur kabhi sawal ka jawab nahi deta.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Apni sehat ke nuqsan par logon ko khush karna main kaise rok sakta hoon?
answer: No kehna seekhein, ye aik mukammal jumla hai. Aapka waqt aur energy mehdoood resources hain jinko aapko bachana zaroori hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Gham aur depression mein farq kya hai?
answer: Gham ya afsos ek normal reaction hai kisi nuqsaan, na-umeedi, masail, ya doosri mushkil halaat ke liye. Waqt-waqt par gham mehsoos karna insani fitrat ka hissa hai. Is surat mein gham jaldi door ho jata hai aur aap apni rozana zindagi guzar sakte hain. Gham kehne ke ilawa log low, down, ya blue bhi keh sakte hain. Aadmi keh sakta hai ke wo depressed hai lekin agar yeh apne aap theek ho jata hai aur zindagi par bara asar nahin dalta, toh yeh depression illness nahi hoti. Depression mental illness hai jo aapke mood, apni pehchaan, aur apne gird-o-nawaal samajhne ke tareeqay ko mutasir karti hai. Is ke mukhtalif naam bhi hain jaise clinical depression, major depressive disorder, ya major depression. Depression azaadi se aur sabab ke bina aa sakta hai aur lambe arsey tak rehta hai. Yeh gham ya low mood se kaafi zyada hai. Depression mein log khud ko bekaar ya be-umeed mehsoos karte hain. Wo bay-ja ziradari mehsoos kar sakte hain. Kuch log gussa ya chidhchida pan bhi mehsoos karte hain. Yeh tawajjo dene ya faislay karne mein mushkilat paida kar sakta hai. Bohat log apni pasand ki cheezen mein dilchaspi kho dete hain aur dusron se door ho jate hain. Depression ke physical nishaniyan bhi hoti hain, jaise neend, bhookh, taqat aur achanak dard ya dukhna. Kuch log maut ya apni zindagi khatam karne ke khayalat bhi karte hain. Depression do hafton se zyada rehta hai, apne aap theek nahi hota, aur zindagi ko mutasir karta hai. Yeh asli bemari hai aur bohat asani se ilaaj ke laayak hai. Agar aap depression ki fikr karte hain toh madad lena zaruri hai.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Olfactory Hallucination kya hai
answer: Aisi khushboo mehsoos karna jo physically mojood nahi hoti, aksar badboo dar, aksar temporal lobe epilepsy se mutalliq.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Agar mein apne dost ya rishtedar ke bare mein pareshan hoon to mein kya karoon?
answer: Yeh aapke rishtay par mabni hai. Ek shafqat bhara tareeqa yeh ho sakta hai ke aap unhein munasib support hasil karne ke liye rai dein, jo shuruat ke liye madadgar hoga.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Dissociative Identity Disorder, Multiple Personality Disorder, aur Schizophrenia mein kya farq hai?
answer: Kabhi kabhi log Dissociative Identity Disorder, jisay pehle Multiple Personality Disorder ke naam se jana jata tha, aur Schizophrenia ko mix kar dete hain. Schizophrenia ka matlab hai split mind, lekin ye naam is liye rakha gaya tha kyun ke is condition mein aapko psychosis ke dauran haqeeqat se alag hote hue mehsoos hota hai, saath hi soch, jazbaat, aur doosri functions mein tabdeeli hoti hai. Dusri taraf, Dissociative Identity Disorder ek aisa halat hai jis mein shakhs apni apni pehchaan ka taqseem ya tukdon mein tawaqquf karta hai. DID zyada tar tukdon mein pehchaanon ki baat karta hai, na ke sirf mukhtalif zaati shaklain jo khud ba khud paida ho jati hain. Zyada tar log apne wajood ke mukhtalif hisay ko poore shakhs ka hissa samajhte hain. Jo log DID ka tajurba karte hain, unke pehchaan ke tukde bohat mukhtalif khususiyaat rakhte hain, jin mein apni tareekh, pehchaan, aur andaaz shamil hain. DID ka ek aham hissa 'dissociation' hai jiska matlab hai apne gird-o-nawaah se muntakil mehsoos karna. Jo log DID ka samna karte hain unke zehni yaadashat mein kayi be-wajah khala hotay hain, kuch maloomat bhool jate hain jo unhon ne pehle seekhi hoti hain, ya woh cheezen yaad nahi rakh pate jo unhon ne kahi hoti hain ya ki hoti hain. TV ya filmein mein DID ke natayej aksar wazeh dikhaye jate hain, magar asal zindagi mein yeh doosron ke liye zahir nahi hota, aur tashkhees mein kaafi waqt lag sakta hai. Schizophrenia ek sanjeeda zehni bemari hai jo hallucinations (jo haqeeqat mein mojood nahi hoti) aur delusions (aise yaqeen jo sach nahi ho sakte) paida karti hai, aur dusre aalamaat jaise uljha hua sochna, uljhi hui guftagu, aur jazbati izhaar mein mushkilat hoti hain. Jo log Schizophrenia ka tajurba karte hain woh aise awazon ya ehsaasaat mehsoos kar sakte hain jo asal mein mojood nahi, ya aisi cheezen yaqeen karte hain jo asal mein maujood nahi, lekin Yeh alag alag zaati shanakhtain nahi hotin.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Derealization kya hai
answer: Ek dissociative tabdeeli jahan baahri mahaul bilkul ghair haqeeqi, khwab jaisa, banawati, dhundla ya dhanche mein tabdeeli shuda lagta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Main subah kyun zyada beqarar mehsoos karta hoon?
answer: Cortisol ki satah subah fitri tor par zyada hoti hai, ek pur-sukoon routine azmaen jaise halka phulka stretch karna ya meditation taake beqarari ko barqarar rakha ja sake.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Binge Eating Disorder kya hai
answer: Is mein ek makhsoos waqt ke dauran itni zyada ghiza khana shamil hota hai jitni aksar log nahi khayenge, bina kisi purging ke.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Insomnia Disorder kya hai
answer: Neend ki miqdaar ya quality se musalsal na khushi, jo neend shuru karne mein mushkil, neend banaye rakhne mein takleef, ya subah jaldi uthne ke sath hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Agar meri koi motivation na ho to main exercise kaise shuru karun?
answer: Sirf 5 minute chalna shuru karein. Aksar shuru karne ka amal hi motivation paida karta hai jari rakhne ke liye.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Trauma ki tashreeh kya hai
answer: Trauma aik gehra neurobehavioral response hai jo aise wazeh events par hota hai jo fard ke internal psychological defense mechanisms ko mukammal tor par tod deta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Flat Affect kya hai
answer: Fard ke jazbati izharat ki shiddat mein shadid kami jo ke ghair mutaharrik chehra aur monotone awaaz ke sath zahir hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: How can I find a support group?
answer: Support groups are a way for people with a common experience to help each other and learn from each other. There are support groups for people with any experience of mental illness, support groups for people with a specific diagnosis, support groups for family members and friends, and more. Support groups are offered by community organizations, mental health service providers, schools, campuses, and support agencies. Here are some general resources to help you find a mental health or substance use related support group in BC Talk to your mental health care provider. They might be able to make recommendations. The Mood Disorders Association of BC offers a network of peer support groups around the province for people who experience mental illnesses like mood disorders or post-traumatic stress disorder. They also have groups for family and friends. Groups are drop-in. Many Canadian Mental Health Association branches offer support services, including support groups. If your local branch doesnt have their own program, they can recommend other services in your community. The BC Schizophrenia Society maintains a directory of support groups and other regular events for family members of people with a mental illness. For groups related to alcohol or drug use, call the Alcohol and Drug Information Referral Service at 1-800-663-1441 or 604-660-9382 in the Lower Mainland. For groups in the Lower Mainland, search the Red Book Online. If you are at school or on campus, talk to a school counsellor or your campus health and wellness office. For online support, see some suggestions at www.heretohelp.bc.cadiscuss. This can be particularly useful if you dont have a group in your community or have trouble getting to an in-person group. In order to benefit the most from a support group, you need to feel safe enough to share your experiences and thoughts, and you need to feel comfortable supporting others. It can be helpful to contact the group facilitator or organizer ahead of time to see if a particular group might be a good fit for you. We have a checklist to help you evaluate support groupsincluding when it might be time to leave one. Sometimes a group just doesnt work for you, and thats okay. If you feel comfortable, you can try talking to the facilitator to see if they can recommend another group that you can try.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Reaction Formation kya hai
answer: Ek na-qabil-e-qubool daakhli jazba ko chhupana by zehni tor par uske bilkul mukhalif rawaiye ko shadid tor par zahir karna.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Mujhe kisi apne se depression ka tashkhees hua hai. Main kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
answer: Hum fitratan un logon ki madad karna chahte hain jo khud ko behaal mehsoos kar rahe hain. Jab apka koi aisa pyara jis ke sath physical health ka masla ho, madad kaise karni hai yeh wazeh lagta hai, lekin mental illness jaise depression mein aksar log unsure hotay hain ke behtareen madad kaise karein. Kuch tips hain: Aapko zaroori nahin ke samajhna pade ke woh shakhs kya guzarta hai, bas yeh tasleem karna zaruri hai ke yeh mushkil tajarba hai. Aap kuch keh sakte hain jaise, 'Mujhe maloom hai yeh tajarba ya symptoms aap ke liye dardnaak hain,' ya 'Mujhe afsos hai ke aap behaal hain.' Agar aap ne khud kabhi depression dekha hai, toh keh sakte hain, 'Mujhe pata hai aap kaisa mehsoos kar rahe hain.' Sab ko yaad rahe ke har shakhs depression ko alag tareeqay se mehsoos karta hai, aur hamdardi illness ke asraat ko samajhne ke liye hoti hai, symptoms ka muqabla karne ke liye nahi. Aapko expert honay ki zarurat nahin, lekin depression ke bare mein zyada seekhna madadgar ho sakta hai. Hamara Depression info sheet shuruaat ke liye acha hai, aur humare paas kaafi resources ki list hai. Kabhi kabhi problems ya fikr par baat karna baree madad hoti haibahut se log bas suna jana chahte hain. Hamesha yaad rakhein ke khul kar mushkil baatein karna aasaan nahin hota. Aap unhe baat karne ko nahin majboor kar sakte, lekin unhe aman aur khamosh jagah de sakte hain. Jab koi pyara aap se baat kare, to bina mpaka aur dhyan dhang se sunein. Hamesha hamdardi aur be-insaafi ke baghair sunein. Chahe aap masla samajh na paayein, aapka maksad parhna chahiye ke pyara kis dard se guzar raha hai. Family Toolkit ke Module Three mein communication aur sun'ne ke tips hain. Kuch log abhi puri tarah baat karne ko tayar nahin hote. Unki hudood ka ehtiram karen. Be-mang advice aksar madadgar nahin hoti. Aap shayad problem hal na kar saken, aur aapko poori kahani bhi maloom nahin hoti. Agar aap apne tajurbe share karna chahe, toh poochhein ke dosre ke liye yeh faidemand hoga ya nahi. Har shakhs ki zaruratein alag hoti hainhamisha yeh na samjhein ke aapko pata hai behtareen kya hai. Kuch log jazbati madad chahte hain, jaise kisi se baat karna. Kuch log counselor ya professional se achha talluq rakhte hain, lekin practical madad chahte hain, jaise ghar ka kaam ya ilaaj plan par amal karna. Aur kuch log sirf social events mein shamil hona chahte hain. Log jab depression mein hotay hain to aksar negative khayalat aur jazbat hotay hain jo dusron par sodium asar daalte hain. Aapke apne liye support lena acha haifamily aur friends ke liye alag support groups hain. BC Schizophrenia Society ke paas mental illness ke liye family support groups ka directory hai. Agar aapke pyare ko ilaaj pasand nahin ya dusray options chahye, toh aap unki madad kar sakte hain dusre resources or services dhundhne mein.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Catastrophizing kya hai
answer: Ek cognitive distortion jisme fard apne aap maan leta hai ke kisi ambiguous waqia se sab se bara nuqsaan hoga.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Positive aur Negative Symptoms kya hain?
answer: Positive aur Negative symptoms schizophrenia ke do groups hain jo medical terms mein istamal hote hain. Positive symptoms chizain shaamil karte hain. Positive symptoms mein hallucinations (aise ehsaasat jo haqeeqat mein nahi hote), delusions (aise yaqeen jo asal mein nahi ho sakte), aur repetitive harkatain jo control karna mushkil hota hai shamil hain. Negative symptoms chizain khatam kar dete hain. Negative symptoms mein jazbaat ka izhaar na kar pana, laparwahi, bolne mein mushkilat, aur muasharti rawaiye se khud ko alag kar lena shamil hain. Ek teesri category bhi hoti hai jise cognitive symptoms kaha jata hai. Is mein soch se related har cheez shamil hai, jaise be-tarteeb soch, yaad dasht ki mushkilein, aur tawajju aur diqqat mein mushkilat.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Cyclothymia kya hai
