answer: Cyclothymia aik chronic, mutaghayyar mood disturbance hai jisme kam az kam do saal tak kai dafa hypomanic aur depressive symptoms hote hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mental health aur mental illness mein farq kya hai?
answer: Mental health aur mental illness aaj kal aksar aise use hotay hain jaise dono ka matlab ek ho, lekin aisa nahin hai. Har insan ki mental health hoti hai, jese har insaan ki sehat hoti hai. Jaise World Health Organization kehte hain, 'Sehat bina mental health ke mumkin nahin.' Zindagi ke douran, har insaan mental illness nahi lega, magar sab ko apni mental wellbeing mein mushkilat ka samna karna parta hai, jese hum sab ko apni jismani sehat mein kabhi kabhi mushkilat hoti hain. Jab hum mental health ki baat karte hain, toh hum apne jazbat, khayalat, masail hal karne ki salahiyat, samaji talluqaat aur apne gird-o-nawaal ki samajh ki baat kar rahe hain. Mental illness aisi bemari hai jo aise tareeqay se asar dalti hai jese log sochte, mehsoos karte, rawaiya ikhtiyar karte ya dusron se ta'alluq rakhte hain. Mukhtalif mental illnesses mukhtalif symptoms rakhti hain jo logon ki zindagi alag tareeqay se mutasir karte hain. Sehat aik on/off switch nahi hai. Sehat ke mukhtalif darjaat hotay hain. Log ek continuum par hote hain jo achi sehat se le kar behtareen na hone aur illness ya disability tak jata hai. Misal ke taur par, kuch log achi sehat mein zindagi guzar rahe hote hain. Kuch ko serious sehat ke masail hain jin ka asar zindagi par bura hota hai. Kuch masail der tak chalti hain, kuch jaldi theek ho jati hain. Aksar log kendra mein hote hain bina zyada masail ke. Mental health bhi yeh yahee hai. Jese koi pareshaan mehsoos karta hai lekin serious illness nahin rakhta, log kharab mental health rakh sakte hain lekin mental illness nahin. Hum sab ke kuch din aise hotay hain jab hum thode down, stressed, ya overwhelmed mehsoos karte hain. Ache mental health ka ahem hissa yeh hai ke hum realisti tarah se problems ko dekhen. Ache mental health ka matlab hamesha khush rehna nahin, ya issues ko ignore karna nahin, balki masail ke bawajood accha rehna hai. Jese aap poor mental health rakh sakte hain bina mental illness ke, usi tarah acha mental health mumkin hai jab mental illness diagnose ho jaye. Kyunke mental illnesses jaise dosri batein, episodic hoti hainkabhi bimari hoti hai aur kabhi behtari. Sahi support aur tools ke sath koi bhi apni zindagi achi tareh guzar sakta hai, jis tarah bhi wo achha samajhta ho, aur apne maqsad hasal kar sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Dialectical Behavior Therapy kya hai
answer: Dialectical Behavior Therapy ek zehni tabdeeli ka zariya hai jo chronic jazbati beqarari aur borderline khasaais ko nishana banata hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Agar dawa lene ke baad main behtar mehsoos karun, kya iska matlab hai ke main theek ho gaya hoon aur dawa lena band kar sakta hoon?
answer: Yeh aam baat hai ke log apni dawa lena band kar dete hain jab woh mehsoos karte hain ke alamat qabu mein hain. Kuch log dawa ke side effects ki wajah se bhi use chhod dete hain, baghair samjhay ke aksar side effects ko asani se manage kiya ja sakta hai. Jabke dawa lena chhor dena uchit lagta hai, masla yeh hai ke ziadatar alamat wapas aa jate hain. Agar aap ya aapka bacha dawa le raha hai, to bohat zaruri hai ke aap apne doctor ke saath milkar treatment mein badlao ki faislay karein. Aap unse baat karein ke aap kaise kar rahe hain aur agar side effects hain jo aapko ilaaj jari rakhne se rok rahay hain. Woh aapke saath milkar in side effects ko kam karne ki strategies banayenge ya aise ilaaj ki mansuba bandi karenge jo aapke liye behtareen ho.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: How can I take care of my physical health?
answer: Taking care of your physical health is also good for your mental health. Its more important than ever to keep yourself healthy. Try to eat as well as you can. It may be easier to reach for unhealthier comfort foods and snacks while you spend more time at home, but try to keep a balanced approach. When you stock up on groceries, dont ignore fresh fruit and vegetableswe still have everything we need to prepare food. Now that were advised to limit the amount of time we spend in public spaces like grocery stores, this is a great time to try out new fruits and vegetables that keep at home for longer periods of time. If its safer for you to stay home or you are in self-isolation, reach out for help. Many grocery stores and meal prep services offer safe, no-contact delivery. You can also ask family or friends to bring you groceries, or look for local COVID-19 support groups on social media. Its safest if others leave food and other supplies outside of your door to avoid spreading the virus. Exercise is an important part of mental health and well-being, stress management, and health sleep. However, its something that many people give up when they start to feel stressed or overwhelmed. If its safe for you to do so, spend time outside. You should still avoid busy areas or groups and stay at least two metres away from others, but there is no reason to avoid walks, runs, or other safe outdoor activities. Note that some municipalities, BC Parks, and Parks Canada have restricted some outdoor spaces to reduce crowds, so check the status of your local parks or trails and respect closurestheyre just keeping everyone safe. If you prefer to exercise indoors, you can also find many different exercises classes online. You can try yoga, follow a barre class, work on your cardio, pick up a new dumbbell routine, and keep up with Crossfit WODs from the comfort of your living room. Look for no-equipment exercise routines or classes if you dont already have equipment. Poor sleep can make even simple problems feel a lot worse than they really are. Poor sleep can affect your mood, your outlook, and your patience. Unfortunately, stress and anxiety can really take a toll on your sleep. If youre having a hard time sleeping, be proactive and practice healthy sleep habits. For more, check out Wellness Module 6 Getting a Good Nights Sleep at www.heretohelp.bc.cawellness-modulewellness-module-6-getting-a-good-nights-sleep. If you have other health problems like a chronic illness, check in with your doctor or health care team to see if you need to take any additional measures or precautions. Remember to plan ahead and do what you can to keep prescription or over-the-counter medications, medical supplies, supplements, or other health needs on hand.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mein kaise jaane ke mein beemar hoon?
answer: Agar aap ke aqeedat, khayalat, jazbaat ya rawaiye aap ki day-to-day zindagi mein aam tareeqe se kaam karne par aham asar dal rahe hain to madad lena zaruri ho jata hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Schizophrenia ki tashreeh kya hai
answer: Schizophrenia aik shadeed neurodevelopmental disorder hai jo delusions, auditory hallucinations, flat affect, aur executive impairment se pehchana jata hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Zehen ki stability ke liye routine ki kya ahmiyat hai?
answer: Routine rozana leni wali faislon ki tadaad kam karta hai, jo zehni bojh kam karta hai aur hifazat ka ehsas deta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Blunted Affect kya hai
answer: Ek jazbati be-qarari jo jazbati izharat ki shiddat mein kafi kami par mushtamil hoti hai, magar flat affect jitni mukammal nahi hoti.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Jab mein khoya hua mehsoos karta hoon to breakup kaise handle karun?
answer: Apni zaati shanakht par tawajju dein. Purane shoq dubara hasil karein aur un doston ke saath waqt guzaarein jo aapko qadr den.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Confabulation kya hai
answer: Yaadash ke khali hisson ko be-aagaah taur par jhootay, badal diye hue, ya galat tafseer shuda maloomat se bharna bina kisi zaati maqsad ke dhoka dene ka.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Muft ya kam lagat wali counselling kahan mil sakti hai?
answer: Zehni sehat ki khidmaat jaise counselling ya therapy aapke BC Medical Services Plan (MSP) ke zariye covered ho sakti hain jab aap kisi hospital ya mental health clinic se service hasil karte hain. Apne ilaqay ke health authority se rabta karein takay apne ilaqay mein counselling services ke bare mein maloomat hasil kar sakein. HealthLink BC ke Find Services tool aur Locator app bhi madadgar sabit ho sakte hain. Aksar programs ke liye doctor ka referral zaruri hota hai. Baghair referral ke private system se care leni parti hai, jo government funded nahi hota. Private mental health services mehangi ho sakti hain, jo achi dekhbhal dhoondhne mein rukawat paida karti hai. Seedha jawab nahi magar kai jagah hoti hain jahan aap dekh sakte hain. Agar aapke paas kaam se health benefits hain, to apne coverage ke bare mein maloomat lein. Kuch plans private counselling ya therapy sessions ko cover karte hain. Workplace Employee/Family Assistance Plan bhi kuch services ya community services ke liye referrals de sakta hai. Kuch psychologists, clinical counsellors, aur dusray providers sliding scale offer karte hain, matlab ke unki fees aapki aamdani par mabni hoti hai. Service providers se seedha rabta karein aur poochain ki kya wo sliding scale service dete hain. Vancouver mein aik private clinic mein low-cost counselling options ki achi list hai. Lower Mainland ke bahar ke log is list ko dekh kar apne ilaqay mein milti julti organizations dhoondh sakte hain. Mental health organizations jaise Anxiety Canada, Canadian Mental Health Association, BC Schizophrenia Society, Institute of Families for Child and Youth Mental Health, Mood Disorders Association of BC, ya Jessies Legacy se rabta karein. Wo shayad apke ilaqay mein khidmaat deti hon ya local contacts ki referral dein. Aap humein bhi email kar sakte hain aur hum aapke community ke liye recommendations dene ki koshish karenge.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Main apni zehni sehat ke baare mein apne boss se baat cheet kaise shuru karoon?
answer: Apni halat ka apni paidawariyat par asar par tawajjuh dein aur mukhtasir tor par wo khaas sahulatain batain jo aap ki performance behtar banane mein madadgar ho sakti hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Verbigeration kya hai
answer: Khaas alfaaz ya be-maani guftagu ke tukdon ka lagataar, be-wajeh, aur automatic dohraana bina kisi khariji trigger ke.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Gut-brain axis ka function kya hai?
answer: Gut-brain axis aik pechida do simti raabta hai jo neural, endocrine, aur immune nizaamon ke zariye gut ko dimagh se jorta hai.
reference: Lancet Psychiatry Clinical Evidence Database

question: Narcolepsy kya hai
answer: Ek neurological bemari jo bar bar aisi halat se juri hoti hai jisme neend ki zabardast zarurat mehsoos hoti hai, aur insaan din ke dauran bhi neend mein chala jata hai ya nap karta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Imposter syndrome kya hai aur main ise kaise theek karoon?
answer: Ye dar hai ke aapko fraud ke taur par expose kar diya jaye jabke aap kamyab hain. Apni kamyabiyaan ek win folder mein rakhein taake apni skills yaad rahein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: How can I see a psychiatrist?
answer: A psychiatrist is a specialist doctor. In BC, you need to ask your doctor for a referral. If you dont see a regular family doctor, you can ask any doctor at a walk-in clinic for a referral. In some cases, you may be able to self-refer or make an appointment with a mental health program yourself, but that may not get you access to a psychiatrist. Contact your local mental health centre to see whats available in your area. If you need help finding your local mental health centre. also also you can talk to psycharist available online in our app
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Main sharaab ya nashili madon ke istemal ke maslay ke liye madad kaisay dhundhun?
answer: Kya aap apni substance use, jaise sharab ya doosre drugs, mein tabdeeli lana chahte hain? Yeh ek aham qadam ho sakta hai. Kuch log apni madon ki istemal kam kar lete hain ya khud se band kar lete hain ya self-help material ke zariye. Magar zyada tar logon ko doosron ki madad ki zarurat hoti hai - family ke members, dost, health professionals, ya aise log jo substance use ke masail ka samna kar rahe hain. Aap ke liye sahi madad kai cheezon par munhasir hai, un mein aap jo drug use kar rahe hain, kitna aur kitni dafa istemal karte hain, aapki sehat aur muashrati halat, aur aap ki pasand shamil hain. Madad lena aapki zindagi ke raaste par qaboo chor dena nahi hai. Aap hi aakhri faisla karne wale hain ke aap kaise aur kitni tabdeeli laiange. Ek tareeqa madad lene ka yeh hai ke kisi doktor se baat karein jise aap bharosa karte hain aur jise apne masail batane mein aap ko rahat mehsoos hoti hai. Kuch drugs ghair qanuni hain, is liye bohat logon ko darr hota hai ke agar wo apne drug use ka zikr karen to kya hoga. Yeh jaanna zaruri hai ke zyada ter cases mein doctors aap ki privacy ka tahaffuz karte hain - yeh kanoon hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Hypnagogic Hallucination kya hai
answer: Ek zinda sensory ehsas jo poori jagradgi se neend ke inteqal ke dauran hota hai, jo mehfooz samjha jata hai magar narcolepsy mein aam hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Restless Legs Syndrome kya hai
answer: Taangon ko hilanay ki tamanna jo aam tor par bechaini ke ahsas ke sath hoti hai, aur ye aram ya bekaar rehnay ke dauran shuru ya zyada ho jati hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: Kya creative shoqon se depression mein madad mil sakti hai?
answer: Ji haan, painting, moseeqi ya baghbani jaise funoon aise haalat paida karte hain jo manfi khayalat se door karte hain aur maharat barhati hain.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Zehni sehat ke masail kyun paida hote hain?
answer: Zehni sehat ke challenges ya masail zehniati, jismani aur samaji masail ke sath sath zindagi ke waqiat se bhi paida ho sakte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Labeling kya hai
answer: Zeheni soch ka aik intihayi shakal jahan shakhs apne aik mehdood rawaiye ki bunyaad par apne liye ek aam manfi sawar chhapatay hai.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Naye shehar mein tanhaai kaise jhootibara karoon?
answer: Maqami dilchaspi groups join karain, doston se milne ke liye apps istimaal karain, aur ek hi coffee shop baar baar jayein taake regular ban kar logon se mil saken.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Fugue State kya hai
answer: Ek nadir dissociative bemari jo achanak, ghair mutawaqqa ghar se door safar aur apni pehchan ya guzishta tareekh ki amnesia ke sath hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Apne liye ya apne bache ke liye zeheni sehat ka expert kaise dhoondh sakta hoon?
answer: Jis professional ke saath aap ya aapka bacha kaam kar raha hai us se comfortable feel karna ilaj ki kamyabi ke liye bohat zaruri hai. Jo professional aapki zarurat ke mutabiq ho, usse dhoondhna kuch tehqiqat talab kar sakta hai. Shuruaat apne ilaqay mein providers ki talaash karte hue karein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Zeheni bemari ki mani kya hoti hai?
answer: Zeheni bemariyan aise sehat ke halat hote hain jo shakhs ke khayalat, jazbat, rishtedari aur rozana zindagi ke funke munazzam karte hain. Ye pareshaani aur rozana zindagi ke mamul ke kam kaj mein kamzori se mutaalliq hoti hain. Zeheni bemariyan sakhti ke ek musir par hoti hain; kuch halki hoti hain aur sirf zindagi ke chand pehluon ko mushkil karti hain, jaise ke chand fobiyaan. Spectrum ke doosre kinaare par sangeen zeheni bemariyan hoti hain, jo bari ta'sir aur rozana zindagi mein badhawat paida karti hain. In mein bari depression, schizophrenia, aur bipolar disorder shamil hain, aur aksar shakhs ko aspatal mein ilaaj karna parta hai. Yeh zaruri hai ke jana jaye ke zeheni bemariyan tibbi halat hain jin ka shakhs ke kirdar, zaheenat, ya iradi quwwat se koi talluq nahin hota. Jaise ke diabetes pancreas ke fauad mein ek beemari hai, waise hi zeheni bemari dimagh ki biological halat ki wajah se hoti hai. Bil mushabahah jaise diabetes ka ilaaj dawa aur insulin se hota hai, zeheni bemari ka ilaaj dawaon aur samaji madad ke mubtadil tareeqe se hota hai. Ye ilaj bohat mofid hain, jahan 70-90 fisad afrad ko ilaj se apne alamat mein kami aur behtareen zindagi ka tajurba hota hai. Munasib ilaj ke sath, zeheni bemari shuda shakhs ke liye mustaqil aur kamyab hona bohat mumkin hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Coping Mechanism kya hai
answer: Kisi fard ke taraf se kiya gaya shauri ya ghair shauri rawayya aur zehni hikmat-e-amli jo shadid zaati ya baharooni stress parameters ko control karne ke liye istemal hota hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Neologism kya hai
answer: Aisi puri tarah nayi lafzon ya saakht ke ikhtira jo mareez banata hai aur jin ka maana sirf us ke liye mehfooz hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Altruism defense mechanism kya hai
answer: Ek bohat zyada mature psychological defense mechanism jahan fard apni andarooni pareshani ko doosron ki zarooraton ko poora karnay mein lagakar handle karta hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Kya kaam se mental health ke liye ek din ki chhutti lena faidemand hai?
answer: Jee haan, agar asal rest ya clinical appointments ke liye li jaye to yeh puri breakdown ko rok sakta hai aur lambi muddat mein productivity behtar bana sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Frontotemporal Lobar Degeneration kya hai
answer: Zehni behtari ka aik disorder hai jo dimag ke frontal aur temporal lobes ko mutasir karta hai, jis se samaji rawaiye, shakhsiyat, ya zuban mein gehri tabdeeliyan aati hain.
reference: Lancet Psychiatry Clinical Evidence Database

question: Schizoid Personality Disorder kya hai?
answer: Samaji talluqat se mukammal alag thalag rehne aur fardoni mohaul mein jazbati izhaar ki bohat mehdood range ka rawaiya.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Clang Association kya hai
answer: Aisi guftagu mein lafzon ka intekhab unke aawazi sur ya qafiyati khoobi ki bunyaad par hota hai na ke mantiqi ya matn ke matlab par.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Delirium Tremens kya hai
answer: Sharaab chhorne ke dauran ek shadid aur jaan lewa halat jo gehri uljhan, khudkar hyperactivity, aur zinda tasavvurat wali hallusinations se numaya hoti hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Intermittent Explosive Disorder kya hai
answer: Dohra karne wali rawayya wali phatkhariyan jo shadid jazbati dabao par qaboo na pane ki nishani hoti hain, jahan agressiveness ki intensity be inteha barh jati hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Healthy aadat aur lat mein farq kaise pehchain?
answer: Lat aisi cheez hai jo manfi nataij ke bawajood jari rehti hai aur jab aap rokne ki koshish karte hain tou ehm pareshaani paida karti hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Schizophrenia mein positive symptoms kya hain?
answer: Positive symptoms normal functions ki tahrib ko zahir karte hain, jin mein mazboot ghalat aqeeday, sunti hallusinations, aur dhila taluq shamil hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Aamda sehat aur zehni sehat ke darmiyan kya talluq hai?
answer: Aamda aur dimagh vagus nerve ke zariye mutasil hain, ek sehatmand ghiza serotonin ki paidawari ko behtar kar sakti hai aur mizaj ko mustahkam kar sakti hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: How can I use distraction to manage difficult thoughts or feelings?
answer: Distraction is a very valid tool to help you cope when everything feels overwhelming or when you feel lonely or isolated. If you dont have a lot of energy or focus right now, try low-effort distractions like watching TV, browsing Youtube, listening to a podcast or audiobook, playing a game on your phone, reading an easy book or magazine, or working on a simple art project. If you have more energy and focus, give yourself a to-do list every day you can clean and take care of projects around your home, work on hobbies, connect with family or friends, read a new book and catch up on your favourite TV shows. You can find interesting opportunities to take online courses from universities all over the world through MOOCs and other online learning platforms, you can learn a new language online or through apps, and you can learn new hobbies and activities. As more people have to practice social distancing or self-isolation, people are finding creative ways to bring the world into their homes you can tour museums and art galleries, Skype with a scientist, watch animals at zoos and nature preserves, and more. When normal schedules are disrupted, its easy to fall into unhelpful habits. Look for ways to keep yourself on track with healthier habits. You could set yourself goals every day or turn activities into a fun competition with friends or familywhoever takes the most language classes wins Many communities are using social media platforms like Facebook to organize support and help for neighbours. If you are healthy and its safe to do so, you can sign up to walk dogs, pick up groceries and household supplies, and help others who cant go out at the moment. This can be a great way to make new connections in your area, and helping others is good for your own mental health. Just be sure to follow good hygiene practices and physical distancingyour own health is important.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Kleptomania kya hai
answer: Kaam ka saman churaane ke liye jazbati dabao ke samne baar baar apni kapasiat na hone ka amal, jo cheezain naw shakhsi istemal ke liye ya unki keemat ke liye zaroori nahi hoti.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mujhe antidepressant ya dusri zehni dawai di gayi hai lekin mujhe nahin lagta ke yeh kaam kar rahi hai. Main kya kar sakta hoon?
answer: Agar aapko apni dawaon ke bare mein fikr hai, toh doctor ya psychiatrist se baat karna zaruri hai jisne aapko dawa di hai. Kai antidepressants ke liye sudhar dekhne mein kuch hafton ka waqt lag sakta hai, magar doctor se expectations par baat karna acha hota hai. Agar aapko koi aise symptoms ya side effects mehsoos ho rahe hain jo pareshani ka sabab hain, toh aapke medication dene wale doctor se zarur baat karen. Agar aap common side effects ke baare mein kisi behtareen professional se baat karna chahte hain, toh apne pharmacist se raabta karen. Achi baat yeh hai ke aap bina health care provider se baat kiye dawa lena rokne ya dose change karne se parhez karen. Jab aap behtar mehsoos karna shuru karte hain, dawa lena rokna mana hai, doctor ki hidayat ki pabandi zaruri hai. Kabhi kabhi log dawa se allergic reaction bhi kar sakte hain. Kuch reactions serious nahin hotay, jaise ke daane.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Good morning
answer: Good morning. Umeed hai ke aap ka din munazzam aur mutawazan guzray ga.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Akinesia kya hai
answer: Motor dysfunction ki ek halat jisme voluntary jismani harkat ki kami ya bohat kam miqdaar mehsoos hoti hai, jo pseudoparkinsonism mein aam hoti hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Depression ke liye khud madad ke maaloomat kahan se hasil kar sakta hoon?
answer: Khud madad ke wasail tashkhees ya ilaaj ka badal nahi hain. Agar aap apne mood ke girnay ke bare mein fikrmand hain, to behtar hai ke sab se pehle apne doctor se baat karen aur apne alamaat ke jismani wajahein door karain. Lekin jab aap ne apne doctor se check-up kar liya hai, to khud madad ke maaloomat seekhne aur mukhtalif skills apni raftar se ya ilaaj ke darmiyan practice karne ka behtareen tareeqa ho sakti hain. Yahan kuch wasail hain jo ap dekh sakte hain. Antidepressant Skills Workbook do BC ke psychologists ne tayar kiya hai. Is mein aap depression ke bare mein zyada seekhenge, mukhtalif skills practise karenge jo mood behtari mein madadgar hain, aur seekhenge ke apni zindagi ke dusre hisson mein sehatmand tabdeeliyan kaise aapke mood ko asar karti hain. Unke paas specific groups ke liye bhi workbooks hain: Dealing With Depression Antidepressant Skills for Teens, ek workbook logon ke liye jo workplace mein depression ka samna karte hain Antidepressant Skills at Work Dealing with Mood Problems in the Workplace, ek workbook expectant ya new mothers ke liye Managing Depression A Self-help Skills Resource for Women Living With Depression During Pregnancy, After Delivery and Beyond, aur logon ke liye jo sehat ke masail se guzarte hain Positive Coping with Health Conditions A Self-Care Workbook. HeretoHelp site par Managing Depression series teen info sheets pesh karti hai: Dealing with a Diagnosis of Depression, Working With Your Doctor for Depression, aur Preventing Relapse of Depression. Ye series aap ko apni sehat ki dekh bhal mein active partner banne mein madad deti hai, sehatmand coping skills aur self-management strategies seekhne mein madad deti hai, aur zyada. Aksar depression se tawajjo aur motivation kam ho jati hai jo self-help maaloomat par akela kaam karne mein mushkil paida karta hai. Agar aap ko thodi si extra support chahiye ek shakhs se, to Bounce Back Reclaim Your Health aik guided self-help program hai British Columbians ke liye jinhein mild se moderate depression, low mood, stress, ya anxiety ka samna hai. Aapko DVD milti hai jis mein tips hoti hain jo aapko depression ke alamaat pehchananay aur manage karne mein madad karti hain, ya aap ghar par workbooks ke series mein zyada gehrai se skills seekh sakte hain. Aap ek trained coach ke sath bhi kaam karte hain jo Canadian Mental Health Association ka hissa hota hai aur phone ya video conference se support aur mashwara deta hai. Bounce Back free hai doctor ke referral se. Mazeed maloomat ke liye www.bouncebackbc.ca dekhein. Agar aap coach ya referral ke baghair Bounce Back materials tak online BC mein hasil karna chahte hain to www.bouncebackonline.ca hai. Mood Disorders Association of BC ke paas mental health, madad mangne, aur dusre mawazuyat par kai videos hain. Kelty Mental Health Resource Centre young logon aur khandan ke liye websites, toolkits, kitaaben aur dosray resources ki mukammal list rakhta hai. Heads Up Guys mardon ke liye healthy living ke tips aur strategies offer karta hai jo depression se guzarte hain. BC Reproductive Mental Health Program ke paas women ke liye postpartum depression manage karne ka self-management guide hai jiska naam Coping with Depression in Pregnancy and Following the Birth hai. Aboriginal women aur unke khandan ke liye ek guide hai Celebrating the Circle of Life coming back to Balance and Harmony. Ye resources BC ke bahar ke hain lekin ache maloomat offer karte hain. MoodGYM Training Program Australia ka web-based self-help course hai jo depression se guzarnay walon ke liye hai aur free hai. Moodjuice UK ka initiative hai jo self-help workbooks deta hai, jis mein depression wala bhi shamil hai. Kai kitaabein aur workbooks hain jo depression se guzarnay walon ke liye madadgar hain. Apne mental health care team se recommendations lein. Aap local bookstores mein ya mental health ke specialty bookstores jaise Odin Books Vancouver mein mil sakte hain. Aap online bhi order kar sakte hain. BC mein aap Family Support and Resource Centre se BC Childrens and Womens Hospitals mein books free mein borrow kar sakte hain. Unke paas depression ke liye self-help aur reference materials hain aurat, unke partners, parents, aur bachon aur naujawano ke liye.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: How can I tell if health information is good or bad?
answer: Anyone can post anything online. Its up to the readers to think critically about information to decide if it seems helpful, truthful, or safe. Here are key points to keep in mind as you determine which information is worth considering and which information doesnt pass the test. Its so easy to spread information online, and we cant assume that the source were reading or watching is the original source. Before you can evaluate anything, you need to know where the claims come from and determine if its a reliable source. Reliable sources on the coronavirus and COVID-19 illness include the World Health Organization WHO, Government of Canada ministries and agencies like Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada, the Government of BC ministries and agencies like the BC Ministry of Health, and the BC Centre for Disease Control BCCDC. Scientists and researchers at universities and other institutions and health sciences professionals are also important sources of information. Headlines and titles need to be simple and short, so they can sometimes be misleading on their own. They may also be purposefully shocking or controversial to entice you to click to read more. Websites that belong to governments, government-funded agencies, well-known health providers, universities, or groups of medical professionals are generally the most reliable. Be careful of sites that dont list the author or dont tell you much about themselves. Double-check the author and the credentials of any experts quoted or cited to see if they are actually experts in the topic being discussed. Can you find other evidence from other sources to support the claims? Does the author list their sources? Are the sources legitimate, like research journals? Unhelpful sources want you to feel a certain way scared, angry, distrustful, vulnerable. Phrases like Skyrocketing rates of infection are sensational and theyre meant to make people feel afraid. On the other hand, factual statements like We have 50 new cases in BC give you important information without playing into your emotions. Helpful news or information sources want you feel informed and empowered. Who is paying for the site? What products or services are being advertised? What links or other sites do they promote? Are you learning something from a story or experience, or are you simply being directed to buy a product or service? Social media can be a great way to keep in touch with family and friends, especially as we practice physical distancing or self-isolation. Social media can also be an important way to learn from health experts and connect to support services and mutual aid groups in your community. Like any other source of information, its important to use good critical thinking skills when you use social media. Studies find that searching for health information on social media generally has very mixed results. Youll see both very poor-quality sources next to good-quality sources, and its up to you to decide which is which. In addition, social media posts tend to be short and rarely capture everything you need to consider. They are generally useful as a way to start learning or exploring different points of view rather than a place to gather all the information. Visit www.mediasmarts.ca to learn more about digital and media literacy Visit www.healthnewsreview.org to learn more about thinking critically around health claims this resource is no longer updated daily, but all toolkits and lessons are still available This page is adapted from the Evaluating Mental Health and Substance Use Information info sheet.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Depersonalization kya hai
answer: Ek dissociative alagav jisme insan apne zehni amal, jisam, ya jismani harkaton ka baahir se nigehbaan hone ka ehsas karta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Nayi dawa shuru karne se pehle mujhe kya jaanna chahiye?
answer: Dawayi malumat ka behtareen zariya doctor hai jo dawa prescribe karta hai. Woh aapke sawalat ke jawab dene mein qadir hona chahiye jaise: 1. Yeh dawa kya karti hai? 2. Kab iska asar shuru hoga aur kaise pata chale ke yeh asar daar hai? 3. Dawa kaise aur kitni der tak leni hai? Konse ghizayein, mashroobat, dusri dawayen aur sargrmiyan is dawa ke dauran parhez karni chahiyein? 4. Side effects kya ho sakte hain aur agar hon to kya karna chahiye? 5. Agar dose miss ho jaye to kya karna chahiye? 6. Kya is dawa ke mutalliq koi likhi hui malumat dastiyab hai? 7. Kya aur koi dawayen munasib ho sakti hain? 8. Agar haan, to aap ne jis dawa ka intekhab kiya hai uski kyu pasandidgi hai? 9. Aap dawayon ki monitoring kaise karte hain aur konsay alamat is baat ka isharah hain ke dose badhai jaye, kam ki jaye, ya tabdil karni chaiye? 10. Sab dawayen hidayat ke mutabiq leni chahiyein. Zeheni bemari ke liye ziadatar dawaein agar ghair munazzam li jaayein to kaam nahi karti aur zyada dose se sakht ya khatarnak side effects ho sakte hain. Bohat se zeheni davaein chand hafton tak lene ke baad hi behtari ka asar dikhati hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Psychiatric mental status examination kya hai
answer: Ek munazzam clinical assessment alat jo mareez ke hal hi ke zehni haal aur cognitive functioning ko nizam se observe aur wazeh karta hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Somatic Symptom Disorder kya hai
answer: Aisi haalat jisme shakhs ko wazeh jismani alamat ka samna hota hai jo kafi tazleel aur sehat ke baare mein ziada fikr ya bechaini se mutaliq hoti hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Psychological istilahaat mein Xenophobia kya hai
answer: Ek clinical izafa hai social anxiety ka jo beja, shadid khauf ya sakht nafrat paida karta hai ajnabi afraad ya ghair mulki logon ke liye.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Agar mein apni zehni sehat ke khatrey mein hoon to mein kya karoon?
answer: Sab se zaruri baat yeh hai ke aap kisi aise shakhs se baat karein jisse aap yakeen karte hain. Yeh koi dost, saathi, family member, ya GP ho sakta hai. Kisi se baat karne ke ilawa, yeh bhi mufeed ho sakta hai ke aap apne tajurbe ke baray mein mazeed maloomat hasil karen. Yeh cheezen aapko samajhne mein madad kar sakti hain ke aap kya feel kar rahe hain aur madad hasil karne ka aaghaz ho sakti hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Thought Insertion kya hai
answer: Aisi delusion jisme shakhs samajhta hai ke uske zehan mein khayalat zabardasti kisi baahir wali agency ya machine ke zariye dalay ja rahe hain, na ke andar se paida ho rahe hon.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Pseudodementia kya hai
answer: Ek aisi kliniki surat-e-haal jahan buzurg afraad mein shadid depressive symptoms asal neurodegenerative dementia ke cognitive nuqsanat ki naqal karte hain.
reference: Johns Hopkins Psychiatry Patient Guide

question: Echopraxia kya hai
answer: Pathological, be-ihtiyati dusray fard ke jismi harkat ya isharko ki naqal ya tadbeer jo klinical interview ke dauran dekhi jati hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder kya hai
answer: Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder aik anxiety ki halat hai jo shadeed saaqat ke baad paida hoti hai, jis mein dil kharab karne wale yaadon, parhez, aur hyperarousal shamil hain.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Word Salad kya hai
answer: Lafzon aur jumlon ka azeem be-tarteeb aur be-rabt mix jo kisi mantiqi ya makhsoos maana se khali hota hai, aur shaiziophrenia ke aala marahil mein aam tor par dekha jata hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Box breathing kya hai?
answer: 4 ki ginti tak saans andar lein, 4 ki ginti tak rokein, 4 ki ginti tak saans bahar chhorain, phir 4 ki ginti tak rokein. Yeh ek taqatwar tareeqa hai jo behtreen performers dabao ke neeche pur-sukoon rehne ke liye istemal karte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mere zindagi mein koi bada shakhs beemar lag raha hai lekin woh madad nahi le raha. Main kya kar sakta hoon?
answer: Jab koi bara buzurg bacha, bhai, walid, dost, co-worker ya koi aur ahem shakhs pareshan ya khud nuqsan pohanchane wale rawaiyay mein ho, toh yeh mushkil halat ho sakti hai. Yeh naazuk soorat-e-haal hai aap madad karna chahte hain, lekin aksar bare buzurg apni dekhbhaal ke zimmedar khud hote hain. Do ahem nuqaat sochnay layak hain. Pehla, health condition ki tashkhees, khaas tor par jab symptoms online asani se check kiye ja sakte hain, khatarnaak ho sakti hai. Tashkhees professional ke liye hi best hoti hai jo poora haal dekhta hai. Yeh bhi yaad rakhein ke jis shakhs ki aap fikr karte hain woh apni mushkilat aur zindagi par unka asar alag tareeqay se samajhta hai. Doosra, siwaye chand namunat ke, jo shakhs ilaaj le raha hai woh apne recovery mein hissa lena zaruri hai, jaisay kisi aur sehat ke maslay mein hota hai. Zyada taar surat mein aap yeh kaam unke liye poori tarah nahin kar sakte aur koshish rishte ko nuqsan pohanchata hai. Apni fikr aazadana bayan karen, jo asaraat aap dekh rahe hain wo samjhayen, unka nuktah-e-nazar sunein aur mil ke hal nikaalain, chahe aap ko thora compromise karna paaye. Aap unke sath appointment par jaane ki offer kar sakte hain, online screening ya self-test karne ke liye encourage kar sakte hain, ya kisi aur kareebi ko involve kar sakte hain jo fikarmand ho aur unhe madad lene par raazi kar sakay. Kyunke aap frustrated ya be madad mehsoos kar sakte hain, is waqt apne liye support lena zaruri hai, khaas tor par agar aap us shakhs ke qareeb hain jiske liye aap fikrmand hain. Zarurat parne par kisi ko madad dilwana zaruri hai, lekin yeh sab ke liye dukhda war ho sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Caretaker hone ke stress ko main kaise manage karun?
answer: Khali pyale se paani nahi diya ja sakta. Support group join karein aur apni khud ki zarooriyat ke liye waqt nikaalain respite care ke liye.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mujhe bina kisi wajah ke itni gusse ki feeling kyun hoti hai?
answer: Ghair hal shuda stress ya dabai hui jazbaat aksar be wajah gussa ban kar samne aate hain. Koshish karein ke asal masla kya hai jo andar chhupa hua hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Apne ya apne bache ke liye munasib zeheni sehat ka professional kaise dhoondhu?
answer: Jo professional aap ya aapka bacha apna ilaj kar raha hai uske sath rahat mahsoos karna aapke ilaj ki kamyabi ke liye zaruri hai. Jo professional aapki zarurat ke mutabiq ho usay dhoondhna kuch tehqiqat talab kar sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Kisi jise main fikr karta hoon usse dimaghi chot lagi hai. Zyada maloomat kahan milegi?
answer: Dimaghi chot khud mental illness jaisi nahin hoti, lekin jo insaan dimaghi chot se guzar raha ho sakta hai ke usse mental health masail ka samna bhi ho. Yeh mental health problems chot se ya chot ke hawaley se aane wale jazbat, jaise khoon hona, gussa ya frustration, quality of life ke badlaw se ho sakti hain. Kuch suratoun mein mental health ke masail dimaghi chot se mutaliq nahin hotay. Achhi baat yeh hai ke mental health issues ilaj ke laayak hain, chahe aap ya jo aap fikr karte hain usse dimaghi chot lagi ho. Aisi service provider dhoondein jo dimaghi choton aur mental health dono mein maharat rakhta ho.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mujhe therapi kahan mil sakti hai?
answer: Therapi ki mukhtalif qisamhein zyada moasar hoti hain jo zeheni sehat ke halat aur alamat aur un shakhs par mabni hoti hain jinke paas wo hain. Misal ke taur par, bachon ko aisay therapist se faida hota hai jo bacho ki zeheni sehat ki takhassus rakhte hain. Lekin, kayi mukhtalif ilaj aur therapy ke tareeqe hain jo madad kar sakte hain.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Generalized Anxiety Disorder ke bunyadi khusoosiyat kya hain
answer: Bunyadi khusoosiyat mein rozana zindagi ke waqiat ke hawalay se musalsal aur qaboo se bahar fikr shamil hai jiske sath bechaini aur shadeed autonomic aaghaaz hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: How can I find a doctor, psychiatrist, psychologist, or counsellor?
answer: To find a family doctor general physician, visit the College of Physicians and Surgeons of BC to use their Find a Physician tool. You can also see a family doctor at a local walk-in clinic, though its helpful to find a regular doctor if you have ongoing care needs. You can also find a psychiatrist through the College of Physicians and Surgeons of BC. Be aware that you almost always need a doctors referral to see a psychiatrist. You can find a registered psychologist through the BC Psychological Association and the College of Psychologists of BC. To find a clinical counsellor, visit the BC Association of Clinical Counsellors. For more on the differences between these service providers, see the article The Right Path for You Finding your way to and through services in BC from the Finding the Right Help Navigating the System issue of Visions Journal.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Rationalization kya hai
answer: Aisi tasdeeqi aur mantiqi wajuhat create karna jo asal mein na-pasandida maqsad ke liye ki gayi rawaiye ya nateejon ko jaiza banayein.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Gustatory Hallucination kya hai
answer: Jhootay zaiqa ka hoshyaar dosh, aam tor par na-pasandida ya dhatu jaisa, jo bina kisi khane ya peene ki cheez ke mooh ke andar hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Substance Use Disorder kya hai
answer: Ek zehni rawayya jahan shakhs chemical madah istemal karta rehta hai jabke uske nateejon se paida honay wali mushkilat aur dasti amal mein kharabi ho rahi hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Perseveration kya hai
answer: Kisi khaas zabani jawab, lafz, ya motor ishaare ka pathological daurani tak dohraana jabke pehla stimulus hata diya gaya ho.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Global Aphasia kya hai
answer: Zubani dysfunction ka aik shadeed shakl jo mukammal taur par bolne aur samajhne ki salahiyat kho dene ki nishani hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Nightmare Disorder kya hai
answer: Aise khawab jo musalsal bar bar aate hain, bohat zyada na pasandida aur yaad rehnay walay hote hain, aur aksar zindagi, hifazat, ya jismani salamatgi ke khataron se mutaliq hote hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Conduct Disorder kya hai
answer: Naujawanon mein ek takraari rawayya ka pattern jahan dusron ke bunyadi huqooq ya umar ke mutabiq samaji qawaid aam tor par toda jata hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Displacement kya hai
answer: Ek na manzoor shuda jazbati jazbaat ko asal khatarnak nishanay se hata kar kisi mehfooz aur kam khatarnak baahirooni cheez ya shakhs par muntaqil karna.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Euthymia kya hai
answer: Ek normal, mustahkam, aur ghair-depress mental mood ki halat jo sehatmand fard ke bunyadi jazbati tawazun ki numaindagi karti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Magnification aur Minimization kya hai
answer: Soch ki ghalat tareeqa jahan shakhs apni kamzori ko bohat bara dikhata hai aur apni kamiyabi ko bilkul chhota kar ke moham nahi samajhta.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Sublimation kya hai
answer: Na-pasandida fitri jazbat ya ghusse ke amal ko samaji taur par taamiri, paidar aur takhleeqi saragarmiyon mein tabdeel karna.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Jealous Delusion kya hai
answer: Yeh mustaqil aur ghalat yaqeen ke ek kaamilati partner ya shohar/shohra unke saath bewafai kar raha hai, jo kisi haqeeqi medical saboot ke baghair barqarar hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Illness Anxiety Disorder kya hai
answer: Gambhir, be tashkhis medical bemari hone ya usay pane ki fikr jo ke asal mein numayan jismani alamat se mehroom hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Bipolar II Disorder ki wazahat kya hai
answer: Bipolar II Disorder mein sewari manic rawaiye ke baghair hypomanic aur major depressive episodes ki tareekhi mojoodgi zaroori hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: How can I see a counsellor?
answer: You can find directories of counsellors through their professional organizations. Registered Clinical Counsellors visit the BC Association of Clinical Counsellors Canadian Certified Counsellors visit the Canadian Counselling and Psychotherapy Association Canadian Professional Counsellors visit the Canadian Professional Counsellors Association For more specialized counselling professionals, such as Marriage and Family Therapists, see the Federation of Associations for Counselling Therapists in British Columbia. You can make an appointment on your own. You dont need a doctors referral to see a counsellor. Counsellors are not usually covered by MSP, so youll have to pay for the cost of the appointment yourself. Workplace extended health benefits, Employee Family Assistance Programs, or private health insurance plans may help cover some costs. Some counsellors may offer a sliding scale based on your income. If youre facing financial hardship, you can ask when you make the appointment. Learn more about lower-cost options to access counselling or email us with your location and our information and referrals team can see what options there may be in your community. If you see a counsellor through a public mental health centre like a mental health team or outpatient psychiatry program, it will still be covered by MSP. Talk to your care provider if you have questions or want to learn more. Indigenous community members can access some counselling services locally or through the First Nations Health Authority. Contact your local Band or local Friendship Centre, or contact the First Nations Health Authority.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Alcohol Withdrawal Syndrome kya hai
answer: Jis mein sakht aur lambe arsey tak sharaab peene ke baad uska istemal rok dene par jismani aur zehni alamat ka ikatha hona hota hai, jis mein kampan shamil hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Dependent Personality Disorder kya hai?
answer: Ek shakhsiyat ki haalat jismein zabardast aur mustarid zehni zarurat hoti hai ke kisi ki dekhabhaal ki jaye, jis se ghulami jaisi rawaiyat barh jati hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Catatonic Stupor kya hai
answer: Psychomotor activity mein gehri kami jahan mareez poori tarah se beharakat rehta hai aur bahari maholiati asrat ka jawab nahi deta.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Agar meri anxiety mujhe jismani tor par beemar mehsoos karwa rahi hai tou mujhe kya karna chahiye?
answer: 5-4-3-2-1 tareeqa jaisi grounding techniques par tawajjo dein aur doctor se mashwara karein taake dusre tibbi masail ko nazarandaz kiya ja sake.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Mein mental health care ke liye paise kaise ada karoon?
answer: Aapko khud apne kharche uthana hongay. Yeh koi raaz nahi ke yeh khidmaat mehngi ho sakti hain, magar aap apne ya apne qaribi ke office ke extended health coverage ke zariye kharche kam kar sakte hain. Employee Family Assistance Program thi bhi apke ya apke qaribi ke office ki taraf se ho sakti hai. Talib-e-ilm apne school ya campus mental health services se faida le sakte hain. Indigenous community ke members apne Band, Friendship Centre, Indigenous support organization, ya First Nations Health Authority through services hasil kar sakte hain. Saqaafat ya mazhabi communities bhi kuch mental health services de sakti hain. Shayad aap apne mental health condition ke ilaaj ke bade kharche income tax return ke health expenses ke zariye claim kar sakte hain. Kuch providers lower-cost services ya sliding scale based on income offer karte hain. Yeh aapke income ya treatment par mabni hota hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Zeheni bemari ke kuch khabar dainay walay nishane kya hain?
answer: Zeheni sehat ke amraz ke alamat halat ki qisam aur shiddat par munhasir hote hain. Niche aam alamat ki fast hai jo zeheni amraz ki uztarab ka isharah de sakti hain, khasusan jab kai alamat aik sath zahir hon. Baligh afrad mein: Gumrah sochna, lambi muddat tak udasi ya jalan, jazbat mein behad ooi aur neechai, ziada khauf, fikr, ya tashweesh, samaji tanhai, khane ya sone ke udalis tabdili, shadid gussa, wahm ya hasasat (aise cheezein dekhna ya sunna jo asal mein nahin hoti), rozana araz aur masail se nitjhanay ki qabiliyat mein izafah, khudkushi ke khayalat, saf masail ko na manna, anek ghair wazeh jismani masail, daru aur madah-e-muzahmat ka istimal. Balgh bachon aur puri umr ke bachon mein: Daru aur madah zat ka istemal, rozana masail se nitjhanay mein nakami, sone ya khane ki adat mein tabdili, jaismi shikayat mein ziadti, hukumat ke mukhalaf kirdar, school chorna, chori karna ya asqaat ko nuqsan pahunchna, wazan barhnay ka shadid khauf, lambi muddat tak manfi jazbat, aksar gusse ke phatne. Chhotay bachon mein: School mein kar gardi mein tabdili, mazbut koshish ke bawajood kharab numbr, ziada fikr ya tashweesh, zyada activity, musalsal buri khwab, musalsal nafarmani aur shadid rawaiyye, bar bar gusse ki jhalak.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mujhe aik jismani sehat ke maslay se nibat rahe hai aur us ka stress samalna mushkil ho raha hai. Madad kahan mil sakti hai?
answer: Jismani sehat ka zehni sehat par bohat asar hota hai. Yahan kuch resources hain jo aap ko chronic health problem ke jazbati challenges ke sath cope karne mein madad dein ge. Self-Management BC muft programs faraham karta hai har umar ke adults ke liye jo ongoing jismani ya zehni sehat ke masail se guzar rahe hain. Is mein symptoms ko manage karne aur behtareen zindagi ki taraf action lene ki strategies milti hain. Parivar ke members, doston, aur qareebi logon ko bhi shirkat ki ijazat hai. Programs angrezi ke siwa mukhtalif zabanon mein bhi dastiyab hain jaise ke Chinese aur Punjabi. Unke website par aap self-management research ke mutaliq aur workshop ya telephone-based support programs ke bare mein maloomat hasil kar sakte hain. Visit www.selfmanagementbc.ca ya call 1-866-902-3767 (toll-free). BC ke psychologists aur doctors ke group ne aik self-guided workbook banaya hai jiska naam Positive Coping with Health Conditions hai, jo un logon ke liye hai jo health problem se guzarte hain ya aise kisi apne pyare ki madad karte hain. Is workbook mein jismani aur zehni sehat ke talluqaat aur mukhtalif skills seekhai jati hain jo aapko mushkil halat, jazbati ehsaasaat ko samajhne, active rehne, aur sehatmand talluqaat barqarar rakhne mein madad deti hain. Bounce Back Reclaim Your Health aik guided self-help program hai British Columbians ke liye jinhein mild se moderate depression, low mood ya anxiety hai. Aapko DVD milti hai jo depression ke alamaat pehchananay aur manage karne ke tips deti hai, ya aap ghar par workbooks ke series mein gehrai mein skills seekh sakte hain. Ek workbook jo chronic health conditions par focus karta hai uska naam Reclaim Your Health hai. Aap Canadian Mental Health Association ke trained coach ke sath phone ya video conference ke zariye support aur mashwara lete hain. Bounce Back doctor ke referral se muft hai. Mazeed maloomat ke liye www.bouncebackbc.ca dekhein. Agar aap coach ya referral ke baghair Bounce Back materials online BC mein istemal karna chahte hain to www.bouncebackonline.ca hai. Reclaim Your Life from illness, disability, pain, or fatigue aik booklet hai Canadian Mental Health Association ka jo aap ko practical tips aur strategies deta hai takay aap musibat se cope kar ke apni rozmarra ki zindagi mein wapas aa saken. Ye booklet www.livinglifetothefull.ca par farokht ke liye dastiyab hai. Ye Living Life to the Full program ka hissa hai, jo aath hafte ka program hai jo logon ki zindagi mein madadgar tabdeeliyan lata hai. Ye sara province mein offer hota hai aur course ki tafseel website par milti hai. Kai tanzeemaat wo logon ki madad karti hain jo kisi specific illness ya health problem se guzarte hain. Ye tanzeemein aksar logon ko munasib support services tak rasai mein madad karti hain ya apne support groups faraham karti hain. Aap apni health care team se recommendations bhi le sakte hain. Agar aap ko zahiri taur par madad nahi mil rahi, to online support groups ki talash kar sakte hain. Agar aap ko akela support chahiye to therapist ya counsellor aik acha option ho sakta hai. In professionals ko dhoondhne ki maloomat ke liye www.heretohelp.bc.ca/ask-us/how-can-i-find-a-doctor-psychiatrist-psychologist-or-counsellor par jayein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Antisocial personality disorder kya hai?
answer: Personality disorder soch, ehsaas, aur rawaiyat ka aisa nizam hai jo lambi muddat tak rehta hai aur kisi na kisi qisam ka masla ya takleef paida karta hai. Antisocial personality disorder ya ASPD dusron ke huqooq ke hawalay se sochne ke tareeqay ko mutasir karta hai. Jis shakhs ko ASPD hota hai wo qanoon ya mohtamim tawaquaat ki parwah nahi karta, khud ko be ihtiyat faislay karta hai, dosron ko nuqsan pohanchane ya qanoon torne par pasheman nahi hota, aur apne aap ko dusron se behtareen samajhta hai. Logon ko ASPD walay shakhs dishonest, impulsive, aur chalak lagte hain. Kuch log surface par to dilkash lagte hain. Har zehni marz ki tarah, antisocial personality disorder bhi ek spectrum hai. Kuch log kabhi kabhi he inappropriate rawaiya dikhate hain jabke kuch aksar qanoon torte hain aur criminal justice system mein waqt guzarate hain. ASPD sirf bar honay walon mein tashkhis hota hai, lekin ASPD walay bachpan se conduct ya antisocial rawaiyat dikhate hain aur bachpan mein conduct disorder ke sath tashkhis ho sakta hai. ASPD ka ilaaj, aksar psychotherapy, nuqsan ko kam karne aur dusron ke liye empathy paida karne mein madad karta hai. ASPD ilaj ke laayak hai aur behtari aamad middle age ke qareeb ho sakti hai. Hum sab ne kabhi na kabhi kisi ko nuqsan pohanchaya ya dusron ke bare mein soche baghair amal kiya hai. Yahi yaad rakhna zaroori hai ke antisocial personality disorder lambi muddat ka aisa rawaiya hai jisme empathy aur pashemani ki kami hoti hai. Sirf doctor ya zehni sehat ka mahir ASPD jese marz ka tashkhis kar sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Sleep Apnea kya hai
answer: Neend se mutaliq saans lene ki bemari jo neend ke dauran bar bar upper airway rukawatein paida karti hai, jis ki wajah se raat ki neend tukray tukray ho jati hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: How can I maintain social connections? What if I feel lonely?
answer: A lot of people are alone right now, but we dont have to be lonely. Were all in this together. While you may be physically separated from friends, family members, and other loved ones, it has never been more important to maintain those social connections. Social connections are an opportunity to seek and share support, talk through difficult feelings, share a laugh, keep up-to-date with loved ones, and help each other cope. This pandemic is a lot for one person to deal with on their own. While measures like physical distancing and self-isolation are necessary to slow the spread of the virus, the physical separation can amplify a lot of challenging emotions like loneliness and fear. Think about the different ways to connect that are most meaningful for you. For example, you might prefer a video chat over a phone call, or you might prefer to text throughout the day rather than one set time for a video call. Then, work with your social networks to make a plan. You might video chat with your close friends in the evening and phone a family member once a week. Remember to be mindful of people who may not be online. Check in by phone and ask how you can help. The quality of your social connections matter. Mindlessly scrolling through social media and liking a few posts usually doesnt build strong social connections. Make sure you focus on strategies that actually make you feel included and connected. If your current strategies dont help you feel connected, problem-solve to see if you can find a solution. Everyone feels lonely at timesmaybe you recently moved to a new city, are changing your circle of friends, lost someone important in your life, or lost your job and also lost important social connections with coworkers. Other people may have physical connections to others but may feel like their emotional or social needs arent met. Measures like social distancing or self-isolation can make loneliness feel worse no matter why you feel lonely now. Reach out to the connections you do have. Suggest ways to keep in touch and see if you can set a regular time to connect. People may hesitate to reach out for a lot of different reasons, so dont be afraid to be the one who asks. Look for local community support groups and mutual aid groups on social media. This pandemic is bringing everyone together, so look for opportunities to make new connections. These groups are a great way to share your skills and abilities or seek help and support. Look for specialized support groups. Support groups are moving online, and there are a lot of different support lines to call if you need to talk to someone. To find community services in BC, call or text 211 or visit www.bc211.ca. If you need extra support, you can talk with a psychologist or counsellor for free You can access a free phone call with a Registered Psychologist though the Covid-19 Psychological Support Service from the BC Psychological Association. Visit www.psychologists.bc.cacovid-19-resources. You can access free, phone-based, short-term support with a counsellor from a new group called the BC COVID-19 Mental Health Network. Email bccovidtherapistsgmail.com to receive an appointment time. For youth people ages 12-24, you can talk with a counsellor for free through Foundry Virtual. Visit foundrybc.caget-supportvirtual. Call the BC Mental Health Support Line at 310-6789. Its available 247. Chat online with a Crisis Center volunteer at www.crisiscentrechat.ca daily between noon and 100am For older adults Call the Seniors Distress Line at 604-872-123 For youth and young adults Chat online with a volunteer at www.YouthinBC.com daily between noon and 100am For children and youth Call the Kids Help Phone at 1-800-668-6868 or visit kidshelpphone.ca For tips on managing loneliness, check out the following resources Coping with Loneliness from the Canadian Mental Health Association cmha.bc.cadocumentscoping-with-loneliness Loneliness and Social Connection issue of Visions Journal at www.heretohelp.bc.cavisionsloneliness-and-social-connection-vol14 Wellness Module 3 Social Support at www.heretohelp.bc.cawellness-modulewellness-module-3-social-support
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Negativism kya hai
answer: Catatonic rawaiya jis mein bina kisi wajah ke tamam klinical hidayaat ki mukhalfat ya ulat harkat karna shamil hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Agar cannabis khatarnak hai, to hum ise qanooni tor par kyun manzoor kar rahe hain?
answer: Maslan cannabis ka dhuan cancer paida karne wale zaheer zawal rakhta hai. Halaanke, kuch cancers jaise ke munh, zabaan aur lungs ka khatra cannabis ke smokaroon mein tambaaku ke smokaroon se kam hota hai, jis ki wajah yeh hai ke wo aam tor par tambaaku istimaal karne walon ke mukable kam smoke karte hain. Aur jabke tamam nashilli cheezein dimagh par asar karti hain, nashili cheez ke khaas asraat nuksaan ke darjay ko mutasir karte hain. Maslan cannabis ke dimagh par manfi asraat ayni cheezon se kam lagte hain jaise ke alcohol. Cannabis ko qanooni karne se zakhm-e-imkani nuksaanat ko kam karne ke liye qawaneen banane ka moqa milta hai. Kisi bhi ghair qanoni drug ko kharidne aur istimaal karne ka khatra yeh hota hai ke hum hamesha berdast nahin hotay ke us metal mein kya hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Kya mein prescription dawaiyon ke liye paise ki madad le sakta hoon?
answer: BC PharmaCare kuch dawaiyon ki lagat ko cover karta hai Plan G ke tehat, jo Psychiatric Medications Plan kehlata hai, un logon ke liye jo zehni sehat ke liye dawa lena zaruri samajhte hain magar wo afford nahi kar sakte. Aapka doctor ya nurse practitioner aapke liye coverage ke liye darkhwast karta hai. Coverage aam tor par ek saal ke liye hota hai, uske baad dobara darkhwast ki ja sakti hai agar zarurat ho. Apne care team se baat karein agar aap Plan G mein dilchaspi rakhte hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Delusion kya hai
answer: Aisi mazboot, galat yaqeen jo saaf, badlne na wali, aur takraati saboot ke bawajood quwwat se qabool kiya jata hai, aur saqafati context se bahar hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Tardive Dyskinesia kya hai
answer: Ek neurological syndrome jo lambi muddat ke neuroleptic dawaon ke istemal se hota hai, jisme zabaan aur chehre ki be ikhtiyar choreoathetoid harkatain hoti hain.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Main apni dawa ke kharche mein madad kaisay le sakta hoon?
answer: Kuch dawaiyan faraham karne wali companies fani madad programs dastiyab karti hain jo fainasiyal zarurat walay afrad aur khandan ke liye hoti hain, jabke kuch khas riyayat cards faraham karti hain. Ye programs aam tor par doctor ki razamindi aur aap ki maashi haalat ka sabut mangte hain. Kuch programs is shart par bhi hotay hain ke aap ke paas sehat ki bemaari ya dawa ki sahulat na ho. Is ke elawa, kuch prescription programs bhi hain jin ke liye aap pristari ho saktay hain. Mazeed malumat ke liye Healthfinder.gov par jane ki salaah di jati hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Substance use aur addiction mein kya farq hai?
answer: Log addiction lafz ko mukhtalif cheezon ke liye istemal karte hain. Misal ke taur par, 'Main shopping ka addicted hoon' ka matlab sirf yeh ho sakta hai ke us shakhs ko shopping pasand hai. Dusri taraf, 'Woh addicted hai' ka matlab ho sakta hai ke baat karne wala samajhta hai ke woh shakhs apne rawaiye par bilkul qaboo nahi rakh sakta. Jab log addiction ka zikr psychoactive aur mind-altering madon jaise alcohol, tobacco ya doosre nashili asbaar ke liye karte hain, to aksar samajhte hain ke yeh maday khatarnaak hain aur insan ke rawaiye ko control kar sakte hain. Magar saboot kuch aur dikhate hain. Jab ke substance use se sehat aur muasharati masail ho sakte hain, kuch halat mein kuch logon ke liye yeh madadgar bhi sabit ho sakti hain. Misal ke taur par, kai log kisi khaas mauqe par ek pyala sharab peete hain, ya kuch log tobacco ka istemal apni saqaafat ya roohani rasoomat mein kartay hain. Asal mein, insano ne tareekh bhar kai wajah se substances istemal kiye hain jaise khushi mehsoos karne ke liye, behtari ke liye, performance mein izafa karne ke liye, saqaafat ya roohani wajah se, ya naye tajurbe hasil karne ke liye. Substance use sirf acha ya bura nahi hai. Behtari yeh hai ke isay ek continuum yani silsila samajha jaye jismein beneficial se le kar harmful tak use shamil hain. Darmiyan mein, substance use donon ho sakta hai - faida aur nuqsan. Aap doston ke saath mazeedaar raat guzaarte hain, lekin aglay din thoda behaal mehsoos karte hain. Continuum ke aakhir mein, kuch log dependency mein chalay jatay hain jahan unhe drug ki zarurat hoti hai taake woh normal mehsoos kar saken aur wo use tab bhi jaari rakhte hain jabke is se un ki maali, gharelu, sehat ya kanooni mushkilat barh jati hain. Aam tor par, substance use masla tab banta hai jab yeh aap ya doosron ke liye masail paida karta hai, aur kitna use masail paida karta hai yeh mukhtalif afrad aur halaat ke liye mukhtalif hota hai. Kisi shakhs ke substance use ki wajah iska risk tay karne mein madadgar hoti hai. Misal ke taur par, agar koi darustgi ke liye substance use karta hai, to aksar ye sirf kabhi kabhi samaji istemal tak mahdoood rehta hai. Magar agar koi social anxiety jaisi lambi muddat ki mushkil ko cope karne ke liye substance use karta hai, to ziyada mustaqil aur sakht use ho sakta hai. Apne risk ko manage karna yeh samajhne mein madad deta hai ke hum kyun istemal kar rahe hain aur iska apne aap par aur dusron par kiya asar ho raha hai. Hamare buzurgon ki danai ek taleemi usool deti hai ke zyada na istamal karo, na aksar, aur sirf mehfooz maahol mein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Thought Broadcasting kya hai
answer: Wo mustaqil delusion jisme shakhs samajhta hai ke uske khusoosi khayalat bay-sawt andaz mein baahir ki dunya mein nikal rahe hain taa ke dusre log unhein sun sakain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Neuroplasticity kya hai
answer: Neuroplasticity neural networks ki structural aur functional salahiyat hai jo environment ke mutabiq apni wiring aur tanzeem dobara karti hai.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Therapeutic alliance kya hai
answer: Wo mushtarka, bharosemand talluq jo aik clinician aur mareez ke darmiyan qaim hota hai aur jo therapy ki kamyabi ki bunyaad banta hai.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Zeheniat ke liye hansna kyun zaroori hai?
answer: Hansna cortisol ko kam karta hai aur wo khushi k chemicals release karta hai jo fitri tor par stress ko kam karte hain aur logon ko jorta hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Mysophobia kya hai
answer: Gande pan, mafooz na hone, keemiyai infection ya biological infection lagne ka pathological khauf jo zyada tar OCD safai ke riwayaat ko barhawa deta hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: Personalization kya hai
answer: Ek ghalat fehmi jahan shakhs khud ko mukammal tor par bahar ke haadisaat ka zimmedar samajhta hai jo uske seedhay qaboo se bahar thay.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Serotonin Syndrome kya hai
answer: Ek mumkin tor par maut ka sabab ban sakne wala zehriila halat jo zyada serotonin ke amal se hota hai, jisme hyperreflexia, clonus, zehni halat mein tabdeeli, aur autonomic tabdeeliyan paish aati hain.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: MSP kya hai?
answer: MSP ka matlab Medical Services Plan hai. Yeh health insurance program hai jo Canada ke British Columbia mein rehne walon ke liye hukumat chalati hai. MSP doctors ke appointments, specialist doctors jaise psychiatrists ke appointments, aur hospital mein rihayish ke kharche ada karta hai jo medical maslay ke ilaaj ke liye zaruri hain. BC mein rehne walay har shakhs ko MSP mein shamil hona zaruri hai. Aap apni aamdani ke mutabiq mahana fees ada karte hain. Kuch workplaces MSP fees cover karte hain. MSP ke bare mein mazeed maloomat ke liye yahan dekhein. Agar MSP ke liye apply karne ya apni coverage manage karne ke sawaal hain to Health Insurance BC ko Lower Mainland mein 604 683-7151 par call karein ya BC ke dusray hisay mein 1-800-663-7100 par. Wo Monday se Friday 8:00am se 4:30pm tak khulay rehte hain. Aap apne area ke Service BC office mein bhi madad hasil kar sakte hain. Agar aap BC mein naye hain to MSP register karne ke liye 3 mahine intezar karna padta hai. Apna Care Card ya BC Services Card medical appointments ya pharmacy istemal karne ke liye saath le kar jayein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Substance use kab masla banta hai? Madad ke liye kahan ja sakta hoon?
answer: Har shakhs ka substances jaise alcohol aur dusray drugs ke sath taluq mukhtalif hota hai, aur log mukhtalif wajah se substances istimal karte hain. Jo cheez kuch logon ke liye faida mand hoti hai, wo dusron ke liye ya usi shakhs ke mukhtalif halaat mein problems paida kar sakti hai. Substance use ke bare mein zyada janne ke liye, Understanding Substance Use: A health promotion perspective ko dekhein. Kisi aur ki madad ke liye, ek mufeed resource hai Helping People who Use Substances: A health promotion perspective. Apne substance ke taluq se sochne mein madad ke liye, You and Substance Use: Stuff to think about...and ways to make changes ek acha workbook hai. Dusri series Making Healthier Choices about Substance Use: Tips for cutting back or quitting bohat si nafidi tips aur resources offer karti hai agar aap apne alcohol, marijuana, medications, methamphetamine, aur tobacco ke istemal mein tabdeelian lana chahte hain. Agar aap ya aapke kisi qareebi ko zyada madad ki zarurat hai, to Alcohol and Drug Information Referral Service se apne ilaqay ka support hasil karein. BC mein madad ke liye 1-800-663-1441 par call karein. Greater Vancouver mein, 604-660-9382 par call karein. Substance use ke bare mein zyada maloomat ke liye Centre for Addictions Research of BC ki website dekhein.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Seasonal Affective Disorder kya hai?
answer: Yeh ek daurani shakal hai major depressive disorder ki jahan symptoms mausam sardiyon mein numayan hotay hain aur bahaar mein theek ho jate hain.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Avoidant Personality Disorder kya hai?
answer: Is mein shadeed samaji pabandi, apne aap mein kami ke gehre ehsaas, aur manfi tanqeed par intehai hasasiyat shamil hai, jo tanhayee ka sabab banta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Structural neuroimaging kya hai
answer: MRI ya CT scanning ke zariye dimagh ke tissues ki jismani shakl aur saakht ka jaiza lena, khaas tor par psychiatric mareezon ke liye.
reference: Lancet Psychiatry Clinical Evidence Database

question: Antisocial Personality Disorder kya hai?
answer: Ek shakhsiyat ki bemari jo dosron ke huqooq ki barhawaqat nafrat aur khilaf warzi ke saath saath humdardi ki mukammal kami se muzahmat karti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Agoraphobia kya hai
answer: Agoraphobia aik anxiety halat hai jahan mareez khuli jagon ya public transit se bachata hai kyun ke panic ke doran bach kar nikalna mushkil ho sakta hai.
reference: Mayo Clinic Psychiatry Reference Database

question: CBT aur DBT mein kya farq hai?
answer: CBT (cognitive-behavioural therapy) aur DBT (dialectical behaviour therapy) dono psychotherapies ya talk therapies hain. Dono mein aap mental health professional ke sath kaam karte hain taake challenges samjhein aur skills seekhein jo aapko un challenges ko khud manage karne mein madad dein. CBT aapko sikhati hai ke aapke khayalat, jazbaat, aur rawaiye ek dosray ko kaisay asar karte hain. Misal ke taur par, agar aap sochte hain ke log aapko pasand nahi karte (thought), to aap samaji soorat-e-haal se dure rehne ki koshish karte hain (behaviour) aur tanha mehsoos karte hain (feeling). Lekin CBT sikhati hai ke in talluqaat ko apne faide ke liye kaise use karein, matlab ke ek positive tabdeeli (jaise soch ya rawaiye mein) tamam factors mein positive tabdeeli la sakti hai. CBT research se sabit shuda approach hai jo kai zehni sehat ke masail jaise depression, anxiety disorders, eating disorders, aur substance use problems ke liye faida mand hai. CBT structured, short-term, goal-oriented, aur haalaat par mabni hoti hai. Yeh shuru hoti hai mental illness ya challenge ke mutaliq taleem se, aur phir aap skills aur strategies seekhte hain jaise problem-solving ya realistic soch jo aapke khayalat, jazbaat aur rawaiye ko badalne mein madad karti hain. Aap seekhte hain ke in skills ko mustaqbil mein masail se nipatnay ke liye kaise istemal karna hai. DBT CBT ki bunyaad par hai lekin zyada tawajju jazbati aur samaji pehluon par hoti hai. DBT un logon ke liye tayar ki gai thi jo intehai ya ghair mustahkam jazbaat aur nuqsaan pohnchane wale rawaiye ka samna karte hain. DBT evidence-based approach hai jo logon ko jazbaat ko regulate karne mein madad karta hai. Yeh borderline personality disorder ke ilaaj ke liye banayi gai thi, aur maujooda research dikhaati hai ke yeh kai zehni bemariyon ya masail main madadgar ho sakti hai, khas tor par self-harm ke liye. CBT aur DBT ke darmiyan bunyadi farq validation aur rishton mein hai. DBT aapko sikhata hai ke aapke tajurbe haqeeqi hain, aur aapko apne aap ko qabool karna sikhata hai, chahye masail ya mushkil tajurbe hon. Rishtay buhat important hain DBT mein, jin mein aap aur aapke DBT practitioner ke darmiyan rishtay bhi shamil hain. Aksar check-ins hotay hain taake kamiyabi ya masail par baat ho . Ilaaj mein one-on-one aur group sessions dono shamil ho sakte hain. CBT skills ke sath sath, aap jazbaat ka izafa karna, dusron ke sath rishtay bananay, masail ya pareshani ka cope karna, qabooliyat, aur mindfulness seekhte hain. Bohat si talk therapies ki tarah, CBT aur DBT skills ka faida hasil karne ke liye waqt aur mehnat chahiye hoti hai. Magar jab log skills master kar lete hain therapist ki madad se, to wo un skills ko apni zindagi ka hissa bana lete hain jo lifetime tools kehlate hain.
reference: American Psychological Association Clinical Guidelines

question: Anxiety ke liye khud madad ke maaloomat kahan se hasil kar sakta hoon?
answer: Khud madad ke wasail tashkhees ya ilaaj ka badal nahi hain. Agar aap apne mood ke girnay ke bare mein fikrmand hain, to behtar hai ke sab se pehle apne doctor se baat karen aur apne alamaat ke jismani wajahein door karain. Lekin jab aap ne apne doctor se check-up kar liya hai, to khud madad ke maaloomat seekhne aur mukhtalif skills apni raftar se ya ilaaj ke darmiyan practice karne ka behtareen tareeqa ho sakti hain. Yahan kuch resources hain jo aap dekh sakte hain. Anxiety Canada ke paas self-help resources, toolkits, worksheets, aur videos hain anxiety aur anxiety disorders ke liye bachon aur unke walidain, naujawanon, adults, expectant aur naye mothers ke liye www.anxietycanada.com par dastiyab hain. Unka MindShift app skills sikhaata hai jo users ko anxiety manage karne, relax hone, aur achi zindagi guzarne mein madad deta hai. Yeh zyada tar teenagers aur young adults ke liye design kiya gaya hai, lekin dusray adults bhi faida utha sakte hain. Kelty Mental Health Resource Centre ke paas bachon aur naujawanon ke liye recommended websites, toolkits, kitaabein aur dosray resources ki list hai. BC Reproductive Mental Health Program ke paas woh khawateen ke liye self-management guide hai jo pregnancy ke dauran aur delivery ke baad anxiety ka samna karti hain, jiska naam Coping With Anxiety During Pregnancy and Following the Birth hai. Moodjuice UK ka program hai jo anxiety aur dusre mental health masail par self-help aur maloomat faraham karta hai. Agar aap kisi specific anxiety disorder ke liye madad chahte hain, to www.moodjuice.scot.nhs.uk par dosray guides ke liye search karein. Aksar kitaabein aur workbooks available hain jo anxiety problems se guzarnay walon ke liye madadgar hain. Apne mental health care team se recommendations lein. Kuch bookstores mental health aur well-being materials mein specialization karte hain jaise Odin Books Vancouver. BC mein aap Family Support and Resource Centre se BC Childrens and Womens Hospitals mein kitaabein free mein borrow kar sakte hain. Agar aap ko ek shakhs se thodi zyada support ke sath khud madad ke maaloomat chahiye, to Bounce Back Reclaim Your Health aik guided self-help program hai British Columbians ke liye jinhein mild se moderate low mood ya anxiety ka samna hai. Aapko anxiety ke alamaat pehchanane aur manage karne ke tips wali DVD milti hai, ya aap ghar par workbooks ke zariye depth mein skills seekh sakte hain. Aap Canadian Mental Health Association ke trained coach ke sath telephone ya video conference par support aur mashwara lete hain. Bounce Back doctor ke referral ke sath muft hai. Mazeed maloomat ke liye www.bouncebackbc.ca par jayein. Agar aap coach ya referral ke baghair Bounce Back materials online BC mein hasil karna chahte hain to www.bouncebackonline.ca hai.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Wernickes Aphasia kya hai
answer: Ek fluent zubani output ka masla jahan zabani bolne mein asani hoti hai magar alfaaz be maani ya haqeeqi samajh se mahroom hotay hain.
reference: Harvard Medical School Mental Health Guide

question: Dysthymia kya hai
answer: Ek chronic qisam ka depressive mood disturbance jo major depression se kam shiddat rakhta hai magar kam az kam do saal tak musalsal rehta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Psychiatric Advance Directive banane ke baare mein mazeed maloomat kahan mil sakti hai?
answer: Medical advance directive ya health care power of attorney ki tarah, psychiatric advance directive ek kanooni dastavez hai jo sehatmand waqt mein tayar kiya jata hai aur ismein us zehni sehat ke crisis ke douran ilaj ya services ke liye apni khwahishat aur instructions di jati hain, jo us ki care ko mutasir kar sakti hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Projection kya hai
answer: Ek ghair shauri defense strategy jismein fard apne anknay, na qabool shuda khayalat ya jazbaat doosray shakhs par daalta hai.
reference: Oxford Textbook of Psychiatry

question: Bipolar I Disorder ki wazahat kya hai
answer: Bipolar I Disorder ek tibbii tashkhees hai jo kam az kam aik manic episode ka mutalib karta hai jo eham samaji ya pesha vari nuqsan paida karta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Hallucination kya hai
