answer: Ek gehri sensory perception jo poori tarah se kisi bhi miltay julte external physical stimulus ke baghair hoti hai, aur puri tarah haqeeqi lagti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Histrionic Personality Disorder kya hai?
answer: Ek zehni haalat jismein jari ehtsaasat ka izhar aur lagataar tawajjo talab karne ka rawaiya shuruat se jawani tak barqarar rehta hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Loose Associations kya hain
answer: Ek soch ka masla jismey guftagu aisi hoti hai jahan khayalat ek mozo se doosray mozo par bilkul be-talooq ya tukraye taur par muntaqil hotay hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Catatonia kya hai
answer: Ek pechida neuropsychiatric syndrome jo psychomotor khalal se murakkab hota hai, jis mein stupor, mutism, posturing, waxy flexibility, aur intehai nafrat shamil hain.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Hypochondriasis kya hai
answer: Ek puraana tashkheesi lafz jo ab somatic symptom conditions se badal chuka hai, jis mein kisi na dhekhay gay marz ke hone ke hawale se shadid fikrmandi hoti hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Who are you
answer: Main MINDWELL hoon aur main aik artificial intelligence nizam hoon jo daleel par mabni zehni sehat ki wazahat faraham karta hai.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Kya sardiyon mein mood ka girna normal hai?
answer: Haan, ye aksar Seasonal Affective Disorder (SAD) hota hai. Light therapy aur active rehna symptoms ko manage karne mein madadgar hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Good night
answer: Good night. Aaraam deh aur mustaqil neend ka routine sehat ke liye bohat zaroori hai.
reference: OpenAI Clinical System Framework

question: Main har faislay par overthinking kaise rok sakta hoon?
answer: Chhoti faislon ke liye waqt ki had muqarrar karen aur satisficing ki practice karen, yani aisi choice chunen jo perfect na ho magar kafi ho.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Main ek bada shakhs hoon aur mujhe lagta hai ke mujhe ADHD hai. Agla kya kar sakta hoon?
answer: Jab ke hum attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder ko aisi bemari samajhte hain jo bachon ko mutasir karti hai, yeh barhpon tak bhi jari reh sakti hai aur kuch logon ki tashkhees zindagi ke baad ke marhalay mein hoti hai. ADHD ki tashkhees dosri zehni bemariyon ki tarah hi hoti hai, is liye aapka family doctor ek acha rasta ho sakta hai shuru karne ke liye. Aapka family doctor aapke zehni sehat ka jaiza le sakta hai aur agar zarurat ho to ilaaj shuru kar sakta hai, ya aapko mazeed makhsoos zehni sehat ki khidmaton ke liye refer kar sakta hai. Kuch tanzeemein hain jo achi madad aur wasail dhoondhnay mein madadgar sabit hoti hain. Canadian Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder Resource Alliance (CADDRA) ek aisi tanzeem hai jo sehat ke mahaireen ko ADHD ki research, ilaaj aur support mein madad deti hai aur professionals ko training deti hai. Unke public info section mein aap adult ADHD aur assessment ke process ke mutaliq zyada maloomat hasil kar sakte hain. Unki website par adults ke liye ek section hai jismein symptoms, assessments, ilaaj, kaam ke mahaul mein ADHD, resources, aur reading list shamil hain.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Emotional Reasoning kya hai
answer: Ek cognitive ghalati jisme fard yeh samajhta hai ke andarooni jazbaat itne zyada haqeeqat se lagte hain ke wo objective external reality ko bhi durust zahir karte hain.
reference: Beck Institute for CBT

question: Pyromania kya hai
answer: Ek khilafwarzi wala disorder jo jaan bujh kar aur maksad ke sath aag lagane ke barra baar waqiat par mabni hota hai, jo andaruni tension ya activation ki wajah se hota hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Kya mindfulness chronic dard mein madadgar ho sakti hai?
answer: Ji haan, yeh dard ke signals ke sath dimagh ke talluq ko badalti hai, aksar takleef ko qabool kar ke zyada qaboo mein banati hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Functional neuroimaging kya hai
answer: Aise scan jaise ke fMRI ya PET jo brain ke mukhtalif ilaqon mein khoon ke rawani aur metabolic sargrmiyon ko track karte hain taake dimaghi processing ka jaiza liya ja sake.
reference: Lancet Psychiatry Clinical Evidence Database

question: Clinical trials ke baare mein mazeed maloomat mein mein kahan seekh sakta hoon?
answer: Kabhi kabhi, zehni sehat ki service ke istamal karne wale consumers research study mein shamil hone par ghour karte hain jab unhein behtari ka tajurba nahi hota, chahe unho ne mukhtalif davaon aur ilaaj azmaaye hoon. Research studies ya clinical trials mein naye davaon ya naye ilaaj ki approaches ka istemal hota hai jinki suraksha aur asar darustgi test ki jati hai. Hum field mein naye tareeqe ko support karte hain, lekin consumers ko clinical trials ke risks se waqif hona chahiye aur shamil hone se pehle un se agah rehna chahiye.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Narcissistic Personality Disorder kya hai?
answer: Ek aisi bemari jismein lambe arsay tak apne aap ko barha chadha kar pesh karna, itni tareef ki iztirab aur dusron ke liye bunyadi humdardi ki kami shamil hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Depression ke baray mein zyada maloomat kahan se le sakta hoon?
answer: Hamara info sheets mood disorders, bipolar disorder, aur depression ke baray mein maloomat deti hain, treatment options, aur resources ke sath. Humare paas 'What is Depression?' nam ka tool bhi hai jo adult depression ke signs ke sath bipolar disorder ke signs ko bhi screen karta hai. Agar aap basics se aage jana chahte hain, toh hamari Managing Depression series madad kar sakti hai ke aap depression ki tashkhees ke sath kaise deal karen, doctor ke sath achi tarah kaam karen, aur depression relapse se bachen. Aap wahan kai personal experiences aur perspectives bhi paenge jo aapko tanha mehsoos karne se bachayenge.
reference: National Institute of Mental Health Clinical Guide

question: Main social media ki perfection ke pressure ko kaise handle karoon?
answer: Apne feed ko haqeeqi mazmoon tak mehdood rakhain aur app istemal karne par sakht rozana hudood muqarrar karen taake muqabla kam ho.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual

question: Nihilistic Delusion kya hai
answer: Ek afsosnak delusion jisme shakhs ko poora yaqeen hota hai ke khud, dusre log, ya tamam fizai kainat wujood mein nahi hain ya khatam ho rahi hai.
reference: Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders Fifth Edition DSM-5

question: Mudoomi stress ke jismani asraat kya hain?
answer: Yeh musalsal sar dard, peeslon mein tenshan, hazme ke masail, aur waqt ke sath immune system ki kamzori ka sabab ban sakta hai.
reference: World Health Organization Mental Health Manual
